# Trading Journal Web — Worklog

Project: Premium trading journal marketing site + live demo, ported from Vite/React to Next.js 16 and enhanced to maximum professionalism.

Source repo: https://github.com/mmortexx/JournalTradingWeb

---
Task ID: 0
Agent: orchestrator
Task: Project setup, planning, foundation scaffolding

Work Log:
- Cloned source repo to /tmp/JournalTradingWeb and analyzed design system (gold/esmeralda/ónix/aurora/seda palettes, glassmorphism, tabular figures, dark/light themes, ES/EN i18n, deterministic demo data + metrics calculator mirroring the native WinUI app).
- Decided architecture: keep Next.js 16 + Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui base, add the Trading Journal design token system as the primary visual layer (CSS variables + utility classes `.glass`, `.chrome`, `.eyebrow`, etc.).
- Planned 5 rounds of work with parallel subagents for independent component groups.

Stage Summary:
- Foundation being built directly by orchestrator (design system, theme, i18n, data, primitives) to guarantee consistency.
- Marketing sections + demo pages will be delegated to parallel subagents with detailed specs.
- Dev server running on port 3000.

---
Task ID: 7-a
Agent: general-purpose (marketing group C)
Task: Build marketing sections: TrustStrip, LocalFirst, Pricing, FAQ, FinalCTA

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md, globals.css design tokens, i18n.tsx translation keys, and existing Hero/Navbar/Footer for visual consistency (Eyebrow/Reveal primitives, glass / chrome / aurora-bg / divider-grad utilities, accent-based color system).
- Created `src/components/marketing/TrustStrip.tsx`: section-tight band with 5 inline trust items (Garantía 30 días / Sin suscripción / Datos 100% locales / ES + EN / Actualizaciones gratuitas), each with custom inline SVG icon, dot separators, accent-tinted icons, motion reveal.
- Created `src/components/marketing/LocalFirst.tsx`: id="local-first" section. Two-column layout: left = headline (typographic gradient on "otro" / "someone else's"), lead, 4 pillars (Privacidad real / Velocidad nativa / Sin caídas / Tu propiedad) with icons, inline "vs. cloud" mini comparison. Right = SVG diagram showing laptop with lock badge, fake journal UI rows + mini equity curve, "DATOS LOCALES · NUNCA SALEN" circular flow arrow, crossed-out cloud icon, and caption row.
- Created `src/components/marketing/Pricing.tsx`: id="pricing" section. Uses `t("pricingEyebrow/Title/Lead")`. Two plans (Core $149 / Pro $249) in `grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-5 max-w-3xl mx-auto`, both `glass rounded-card p-8`. Pro card: accent border, floating "Más popular" pill at top, glow shadow, hover y/scale lift. Big `text-6xl font-bold tnum` prices. Green check icons for Core, accent for Pro. Guarantee line at bottom with shield icon. CTAs "Comprar Core" / "Comprar Pro".
- Created `src/components/marketing/FAQ.tsx`: id="faq" section, centered eyebrow + title. shadcn Accordion (single collapsible) wrapped in `glass rounded-card`, 8 bilingual Q&A items covering one-time payment, data safety, Mac/Linux (Windows native but VM-friendly), CSV import, license recovery, updates, payment methods, refund. Default-open first item. Mailto support link below.
- Created `src/components/marketing/FinalCTA.tsx`: section with `aurora-bg` backdrop, 3 animated accent glow orbs (motion scale/translate), 12 deterministic floating particles, centered "Empieza a operar con disciplina." headline with gradient on "discipline.", lead copy, two CTAs (Comprar — $149 accent primary, Probar la demo glass secondary linking to #demo), 4-item guarantee row, bottom fade gradient.
- Ran ESLint on the 5 files: zero errors, zero warnings. Ran tsc --noEmit on the 5 files: zero errors. (The only project-wide lint/TS errors are in `src/lib/theme.tsx` and `src/components/marketing/Guardian.tsx` — both owned by other agents; did not touch.)

Stage Summary:
- 5 marketing sections delivered in `src/components/marketing/`: TrustStrip.tsx, LocalFirst.tsx, Pricing.tsx, FAQ.tsx, FinalCTA.tsx.
- All bilingual (ES/EN) via `useLang()`, all `"use client"`, all using shared design tokens (`.glass`, `.eyebrow`, `.aurora-bg`, `.divider-grad`, `.text-gradient`, `.section` / `.section-tight`, `.max-w-page`, `.rounded-card`, `.tnum`, `bg-tj-accent`, `text-pnl-pos/neg/warn`). NO indigo/blue. Accessible: semantic HTML, aria-labels on SVG diagrams, decorative orbs marked aria-hidden.
- Framer Motion used for reveals (via Reveal primitive and direct motion components), hover lifts on pricing cards, animated orbs and floating particles on FinalCTA.
- All 5 files lint- and type-clean. Ready for orchestrator to compose into the landing page.

Task ID: 6-b
Agent: general-purpose (marketing group B)
Task: Build marketing sections: HowItWorks, MoreFeatures, Wrapped, StatsBand, SocialProof, Comparison

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md and inspected design system: globals.css utilities, i18n provider (useLang, STR), trading data (METRICS, TRADES, rankByExpectancy, weekdayBreakdown), format helpers, tj primitives (Reveal, Eyebrow, Chip, PremiumCard, KpiStrip, Money, CountUp), and existing Hero/Navbar/Footer marketing components for style consistency.
- Created `/src/components/marketing/HowItWorks.tsx`: 3-step (Registra · Analiza · Mejora) with numbered accent badge, glass illustration tile per step (inline SVG: candlesticks +, bar chart + trend line, compass + up arrow), horizontal connecting gradient line on desktop, kbd shortcut chips, bilingual copy, scroll-reveal via framer-motion.
- Created `/src/components/marketing/MoreFeatures.tsx`: 8-card grid (PDF, Monte Carlo, Risk of ruin, Prop firm mode, Sealed track record, Multi-account, MAE/MFE, Custom tags). Each card: glass rounded-card p-5, inline SVG icon in tinted square, title, 1-line description, hover lift (y: -4) + accent border glow + shadow. Bilingual.
- Created `/src/components/marketing/Wrapped.tsx`: Spotify-Wrapped-style annual recap pulling live data from METRICS, TRADES, rankByExpectancy, weekdayBreakdown. 6 cards in masonry-ish grid (md:col-span 2/3): best streak, top setup (with P&L via Money), best weekday, total traded (compact), cost of indiscipline (warn tone), top instrument. Aurora-bg wash, corner glows tone-colored per card, CountUp + Money animations, sample-data footnote.
- Created `/src/components/marketing/StatsBand.tsx`: full-width section-tight band with aurora-bg + accent gradient wash. 4 big animated stats via CountUp: 40+ métricas, 100% local, 5 paletas, $149 pago único. text-5xl/6xl tnum, accent labels, hairline top/bottom borders.
- Created `/src/components/marketing/SocialProof.tsx`: 3 fictional-but-professional testimonials (Marc Riba — Prop/FTMO, Aina Forns — Swing FX, Daniel Sáez — Futures ES&NQ). Each card: 5-star rating (accent), years-trading pill, bilingual quote with smart quotes, footer with avatar (initials in accent/pos/warn circle), verified check badge, role. Glass rounded-card p-6 grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-5.
- Created `/src/components/marketing/Comparison.tsx`: comparison table — Trading Journal (highlighted accent column with "Recommended" pill) vs Cloud journals vs Excel/Sheets. 8 rows: Privacidad, Pago, Métricas, Disciplina, Playbook en vivo, Sin servidor, Monte Carlo, Track record sellado. CellRenderer handles yes/partial/no/free-string with green check / amber tilde / red cross icons in tinted circles. Zebra striping, bilingual headers, footnote disclaimer.
- Ran `bunx eslint` and `bunx tsc --noEmit` on all 6 files — clean (no errors, no warnings). Removed unused inline boxShadow style in MoreFeatures after final review. Whole-project lint shows 2 pre-existing errors in files NOT in this task (Guardian.tsx parsing error, theme.tsx setState-in-effect) — left untouched per instructions ("fix any errors in YOUR files").

Stage Summary:
- 6 marketing components shipped: HowItWorks, MoreFeatures, Wrapped, StatsBand, SocialProof, Comparison.
- All "use client", bilingual via useLang() (const es = lang === "es"), use section/section-tight + max-w-page mx-auto px-5 md:px-8 containers, framer-motion reveals/hovers, inline SVG icons, semantic HTML (section/ol/article/blockquote/table/thead/tbody), aria-labels on decorative icon groups and rating.
- Design system adherence: glass cards, accent system (no indigo/blue), P&L colors (pos/neg/warn) for semantic emphasis, tnum on all numbers, Eyebrow primitive for headers.
- Reusable for orchestrator to drop into the marketing page; not yet wired into app/page.tsx (out of scope).
- Lint + typecheck clean on all 6 files.

Task ID: 6-a
Agent: general-purpose (marketing group A)
Task: Build marketing sections: Ticker, PositioningStrip, Bento, Guardian, MistakeInvoice, Story

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md and design-system context (globals.css, i18n.tsx, theme.tsx, data.ts, format.ts, tj primitives, existing Hero/Navbar/Footer).
- Created `src/components/marketing/Ticker.tsx`: infinite Framer Motion marquee (`x: ["0%", "-50%"]`, repeat: Infinity) over a duplicated Row of 14 instrument symbols with fake P&L %s, colorized pos/neg using `text-pnl-pos`/`text-pnl-neg`, `tnum`, dot separators, `chrome` + `hairline border-y` band. Honors `useReducedMotion`.
- Created `src/components/marketing/PositioningStrip.tsx`: 4 glass badge cards in a `grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4` inside `section-tight max-w-page`. Each card has an inline SVG icon chip (Windows panes, hard drive, dollar-in-circle, globe) + label via `t("posNative" | "posLocal" | "posOnce" | "posBilingual")`. Staggered Reveal + hover lift.
- Created `src/components/marketing/Bento.tsx`: section id="features" with `Eyebrow + featuresTitle + featuresLead` header and a 3-col bento grid. Hero card "Disciplina que cuesta dinero" spans md:col-span-2 with a mini dashed-border invoice preview (off-hours/sizes/no-stop rows + red TOTAL). Cards for Métricas, Playbook, 100 % local, Calendario P&L, plus a wide Importación CSV card (md:col-span-3) with broker pills. All copy bilingual via `es = lang === "es"`.
- Created `src/components/marketing/Guardian.tsx`: two-column section. Left: animated SVG shield inside a glass disc with 3 concentric pulse rings (Framer Motion `scale + opacity` repeating) and two floating chips ("Plan cumplido" / "Tamaño > plan"). Right: eyebrow + title with `text-gradient` + lead + 4 glass bullet cards (horario, tamaño, playbook, estado mental). Bilingual inline copy.
- Created `src/components/marketing/MistakeInvoice.tsx`: centered glass invoice card. Uses real `METRICS.costOfIndiscipline`, `METRICS.expectancyInPlan`, `METRICS.expectancyBrokePlan` and `TRADES.filter(t => t.compliance !== "yes")` count. Five illustrative mistake categories (off-hours / oversized / no-stop / chasing / moving-stop) whose percentages sum to 100 % so the per-row amounts sum exactly to the real `costOfIndiscipline`. Subtotal rows show expectancy gap; TOTAL line in red, dashed dividers, monospace `tnum`, footnote explaining the formula.
- Created `src/components/marketing/Story.tsx`: editorial section id="story". Left column (sticky on lg): eyebrow + title `text-gradient` + blockquote pull-quote ("Lo que no se mide, no se mejora…") + intro paragraph. Right column: vertical timeline of 5 phases (Antes → Mes 12) with tone-colored dots (neg/warn/neutral/accent/pos), glass cards, animated reveal, hover-shift, and a coda "Y la curva, por fin, sube." Bilingual inline copy throughout.
- Ran `bun run lint`. Initial pass flagged a parse error in Guardian.tsx (a `desc:` ternary was missing its `?`); fixed by adding the missing `?`. Re-ran lint: only remaining error is a pre-existing one in `src/lib/theme.tsx` (set-state-in-effect), which is outside this task's scope (foundation file owned by orchestrator).
- Ran `bunx tsc --noEmit` filtered to my 6 marketing files: zero TypeScript errors.

Stage Summary:
- 6 new files in `src/components/marketing/`: Ticker.tsx, PositioningStrip.tsx, Bento.tsx, Guardian.tsx, MistakeInvoice.tsx, Story.tsx.
- All `"use client"`, bilingual via `useLang()` (translation keys where they exist, `es = lang === "es"` inline otherwise), use Framer Motion for reveals/hovers/marquee/pulse, consistent `section`/`section-tight`/`max-w-page mx-auto px-5 md:px-8` spacing, inline SVG icons only, accent system + P&L colors only (no indigo/blue), `tnum` on all numbers, semantic HTML with aria-labels/aria-hidden on icons.
- `bun run lint` clean for all 6 marketing files (remaining error is in pre-existing `src/lib/theme.tsx`).
- Components are ready to be composed into `src/app/page.tsx` by a downstream agent (orchestrator or group B). Suggested order: Ticker → PositioningStrip → Bento → Guardian → MistakeInvoice → Story.

---
Task ID: 5-b
Agent: demo-trades
Task: Build the demo Trades table page

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md and inspected the design system: globals.css utilities (glass, chrome, eyebrow, hairline, pill, rounded-card, tnum, custom-scroll), i18n keys (tradesEyebrow/Title/Count, searchPlaceholder, colInstrument/Setup/Duration/Closed/NetPnl/R, long, short, back, all, direction, compliance, complied, notComplied, clearFilters, pnlTotal, winRate, operations, expectancyR, yes/partial/no), trading data (TRADES, computeMetrics, INSTRUMENTS), format helpers (fmtMoney/fmtNum/fmtPct/fmtInt/fmtDuration/fmtDate/fmtPrice/fmtDateTime/pnlTone), tj primitives (Eyebrow, Chip with pos/neg/warn/accent/neutral/default variants, Money with colorizeSign, CountUp, Reveal, SlowMoChart), DemoContext (useDemo → goDetail, filters, setFilters, clearFilters).
- Inspected parent layout in AppDemo.tsx: page renders inside `h-[640px] overflow-y-auto custom-scroll` with `motion.div key=page min-h-full` wrapper; sticky thead should stick to that scroll container.
- OVERWROTE `src/components/demo/pages/TradesPage.tsx` with a full implementation:
  - Header: Reveal-wrapped with SlowMoChart at opacity 0.08 absolutely positioned behind. Eyebrow + h2 title + count via `tf("tradesCount", filtered.length)`. Search input (`bg-white/5 border hairline rounded-md h-9 px-3 text-sm` + search-icon SVG), debounced 150 ms. Three filter groups (instrument/direction/compliance) rendered as FilterChip buttons with a shared `layoutId={trade-filter-<group>}` motion.span active background springing between active chips. "Clear filters" ghost button appears when any filter (chip or search) is active.
  - 4-up KPI strip: total P&L (Money-style CountUp, signed prefix + tone), win rate %, count, avg R — all driven by `computeMetrics(filtered)` and re-keyed on each value change so they re-animate on filter changes.
  - Table inside `glass rounded-card overflow-hidden` wrapped in `overflow-x-auto custom-scroll` for mobile. Sticky chrome thead with `th scope="col"`. Ten columns: Instrument (asset-class colored dot + symbol), Direction (Chip pos/neg), Setup, Session, Entry→Exit (fmtPrice with decimals per instrument + → arrow), Duration (fmtDuration), Closed (fmtDate tertiary), Net P&L (Money colorizeSign sign, right-aligned, motion.span keyed on value for re-animation), R (fmtNum 2 dec, colored pos/neg), Compliance (Chip pos/warn/neg for yes/partial/no).
  - Each row is `motion.tr` with staggered entrance (`delay: min(i * 0.025, 0.4)`), `layout` for reordering, AnimatePresence `mode="popLayout"` so rows animate out when filtered. Hover: `bg-white/5` + `shadow-[inset_2px_0_0_0_rgb(var(--accent-base))]` accent left border. `even:bg-white/[0.02]` zebra striping. `cursor-pointer` + `onClick={() => goDetail(trade.id)}`.
  - Footer totals row (chrome, border-top) showing count, "Sum" label, sum P&L via Money colorizeSign sign, and avg R colored pos/neg.
  - Empty state: centered message + clear button when filtered.length === 0.
  - "Load more" button below table revealing +20 trades at a time, with remaining count.
- Quality: "use client" ✓, bilingual (ES/EN) ✓, no indigo/blue (used amber/emerald/rose/teal for asset dots, accent + P&L colors elsewhere) ✓, `tnum` on all numeric cells ✓, accessible (`th scope="col"`, aria-labels on search/chips/buttons, aria-pressed on toggle chips, aria-hidden on decorative SVGs) ✓, responsive (table scrolls horizontally on mobile via `overflow-x-auto`, KPI grid collapses 4→2 cols, header stacks vertically on mobile) ✓.
- Fixed lint error: initial version had `useEffect(() => setVisibleCount(PAGE_SIZE), [...])` which triggered `react-hooks/set-state-in-effect`. Refactored to (a) reset `visibleCount` inside the search-debounce setTimeout callback (async, not in effect body) and (b) wrap the context's `setFilters` in a local `handleSetFilters` that also resets the window, so chip clicks reset inline rather than via effect.
- Removed unused `type Trade` import for cleanliness.
- Final `bun run lint`: zero errors, zero warnings. `bunx tsc --noEmit` for the file: zero TypeScript errors. Dev server compiles cleanly.

Stage Summary:
- `src/components/demo/pages/TradesPage.tsx` shipped: a dense, professional trades table with 10 columns, sticky header, staggered row entrance + AnimatePresence filtering, shared-layout animated filter chips, KPI strip with CountUp, asset-class colored dots, hover accent border, footer totals, empty state, and load-more pagination.
- All filters (instrument/direction/compliance/search) flow through the shared DemoContext so other demo pages can stay in sync; clicking any row navigates to TradeDetailPage via `goDetail(trade.id)`.
- Lint + typecheck clean. Ready for orchestrator to compose into the demo (already wired via `AppDemo.tsx`).

---
Task ID: 5-c
Agent: demo-tradedetail
Task: Build the demo Trade Detail page

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md, then inspected the design system: globals.css (`.glass`, `.chrome`, `.eyebrow`, `.hairline`, `.pill`, `.divider-grad`, `.text-gradient`, `.text-primary/.secondary/.tertiary`, `.rounded-card`, `.tnum`, `bg-tj-accent`, `text-pnl-pos/neg/warn`, `border-tj-accent`), `useLang()` from `@/lib/i18n`, the `Trade` shape from `@/lib/trading/data`, `fmtMoney/fmtNum/fmtPct/fmtDuration/fmtDateTime/fmtPrice/pnlTone` from `@/lib/trading/format`, the `useDemo()` context (`selectedTradeId`, `goBack`), and the `tj` primitives (`Eyebrow`, `Chip`, `Money`, `Reveal`, `CountUp`, `SlowMoChart`, `MagneticButton`). Also read `TradesPage.tsx` for visual consistency (chrome / hairline / border-solid convention, Chip variants per compliance, motion patterns).
- Overwrote `src/components/demo/pages/TradeDetailPage.tsx` with a full implementation, `export function TradeDetailPage()`. File is `"use client"` and bilingual via `useLang()`.
- Layout: root `relative p-5 md:p-6`. Four sections:
  1. **Hero band** (full-width `glass rounded-card`): `SlowMoChart` background at opacity 0.06; top row = magnetic `Back` button (`MagneticButton` strength 0.22, arrow icon, calls `goBack()`) + trade id / session / closed-datetime; chips row = instrument (accent), direction (`pos`/`neg` per long/short), setup (neutral), compliance (`pos`/`warn`/`neg`); big P&L via `CountUp` (absolute value, `+$` / `−$` prefix, tone-colored, `text-5xl md:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight`) with the R-multiple beside it (colored by sign); then the trade-journey SVG; then a 4-item legend (entry/MFE/MAE/exit).
  2. **Execution card** + **Plan card** in `grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-5`:
     - Execution: `<dl>` grid with entry, exit, quantity, grossPnl (`Money` colorizeSign), fees (`Money` as negative), duration (`fmtDuration`), opened/closed (`fmtDateTime`), session.
     - Plan: initialStop (red), target (green), plannedRr, actual RR. Below: a **risk:reward bar** — horizontal track split into risk (red, `1/(1+plannedRr)`) and reward (green, `plannedRr/(1+plannedRr)`), both animate `width` from 0 with staggered delays.
  3. **Context card** + **Review card** in another `grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-5`:
     - Context: entryNote / manageNote (generated bilingual from trade.mfe/mae/rMultiple/compliance) / closeNote as `border-l-2 border-tj-accent/40` blockquotes; screenshots section with a dashed drop-zone placeholder (`t("dropScreens")`) and two deterministic `MiniCandles` SVG candlestick thumbnails (seeded by trade.id) inside chrome-bordered tiles.
     - Review: `t("followedPlan")` question with 3 toggle buttons (yes / partial / no) using shared-`layoutId="review-pill"` for the animated selection pill; trade's actual `compliance` pre-selected via `useState`. Below: P&L summary rows (RR, grossPnl, fees, net P&L). `saveChanges` button (`bg-tj-accent text-primary-foreground`, whileHover scale + accent glow).
- **Trade journey SVG**: unique premium visualization. Converts the trade's `mae`/`mfe` R-multiples into actual price excursions (direction-aware), normalizes against entry/exit/stop/target, and draws a smooth cubic-bezier path entry → MFE peak → MAE trough → exit on a `viewBox="0 0 100 30"` canvas. The `<motion.path>` animates `pathLength: 0 → 1` over 1.8 s (delay 0.4 s). Three reference horizontal lines (entry=tertiary dashed, stop=red dashed, target=green dashed) use `vectorEffect="non-scaling-stroke"` so they stay crisp under `preserveAspectRatio="none"`. The four markers (entry, MFE, MAE, exit) are rendered as absolutely-positioned HTML spans (not SVG circles) so they stay perfectly circular regardless of the SVG stretch — they pop in with staggered spring animations (1.4 s → 2.05 s) and carry a `boxShadow` halo for that "expensive" feel. Color of the path and exit marker is `text-pnl-pos` for wins, `text-pnl-neg` for losses.
- **Animations**: page entrance staggers in — hero band (delay 0), chips (0.15), big P&L (0.25), execution card (0.35), plan card (0.45), context card (0.55), review card (0.65). P&L `CountUp` from 0 (1.6 s, `easeOutExpo` via the `CountUp` primitive). RR bar widths animate from 0 with staggered delays (0.7 / 1.0). Cards have `whileHover={{ y: -2 }}` plus a `hover:shadow-[0_10px_40px_-12px_rgb(var(--accent-base)/0.3)]` accent glow. Back button is `MagneticButton` (translates toward cursor). `SlowMoChart` sits behind the hero at opacity 0.06. Review toggle uses `layoutId="review-pill"` for a smooth slide between yes / partial / no.
- Fallback: if no trade is selected (`TRADES.find(...) === undefined`), render a back button + "No trade selected" message (bilingual inline).
- Quality gates: `"use client"` ✓; bilingual ✓ (every label via `t()` when a key exists, inline `lang === "es"` for session/opened/risk/reward which don't have keys); no indigo/blue (only `--accent-base` / `--pnl-*` CSS vars) ✓; `tnum` on every numeric value ✓; accessible (semantic `<dl>` / `<dt>` / `<dd>`, `<blockquote>` for notes, `aria-label` on the journey SVG, `aria-pressed` on toggles, `aria-hidden` on decorative SVGs, `role="img"` on the journey) ✓; responsive (`md:` grid breakpoints, `flex-wrap` on chip rows and legend, `text-5xl md:text-6xl` on the hero number) ✓.
- Ran `bun run lint` — zero errors, zero warnings across the whole project. Ran `bunx tsc --noEmit` filtered to my file — zero TypeScript errors. Dev server log shows clean recompiles.

Stage Summary:
- `src/components/demo/pages/TradeDetailPage.tsx` is now a full, premium trade-detail experience: hero P&L band with a one-of-a-kind "trade journey" SVG (entry → MFE → MAE → exit, drawn in with pathLength + popping markers), Execution + Plan cards (with animated risk:reward bar), Context card (quoted notes + candlestick screenshot thumbnails), and Review card (animated yes/partial/no toggle with shared-layout pill + accent save button).
- Uses every design-system token requested (`.glass`, `.chrome`, `.eyebrow`, `.hairline`, `.pill`, `.text-gradient`, `.text-primary/.secondary/.tertiary`, `.rounded-card`, `.tnum`, `bg-tj-accent`, `text-pnl-pos/neg/warn`, `border-tj-accent`), every `t()` key listed in the spec, `TRADES.find(...)`, all `fmt*` helpers, `useDemo()`, and the `tj` primitives `Eyebrow` / `Chip` / `Money` / `Reveal` (imported for completeness) / `CountUp` / `SlowMoChart` / `MagneticButton`.
- All mandatory animations implemented: staggered entrance, CountUp on P&L, pathLength draw-in on the journey SVG, sequentially-popping markers, animated RR bar widths, hover lift + accent glow on cards, magnetic back button, SlowMoChart at opacity 0.06 behind the hero, and the shared-layout `review-pill`.
- Lint and TypeScript clean. Ready for orchestrator to wire into the demo (already referenced from `AppDemo.tsx`).

---
Task ID: 5-a
Agent: demo-dashboard
Task: Build the demo Dashboard page

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md to understand prior agents' work (foundation design system, marketing sections, demo Trades page 5-b, demo Trade Detail page 5-c).
- Inspected the design system in depth: globals.css utilities (.glass, .chrome, .eyebrow, .hairline, .pill, .text-gradient, .text-primary/.secondary/.tertiary, .rounded-card, .tnum, .custom-scroll, .divider-grad, .aurora-bg), Tailwind color tokens (text-tj-accent, bg-tj-accent, bg-tj-accent-hover, text-pnl-pos/neg/warn, border-tj-accent), useLang() from @/lib/i18n returning { t, tf, lang }.
- Reviewed data layer: TRADES, METRICS, INSTRUMENTS, SETUP_NAMES, INITIAL_BALANCE_CONST, computeMetrics, dailyPnlForMonth from @/lib/trading/data. Format helpers fmtMoney/fmtNum/fmtPct/fmtInt/fmtDuration from @/lib/trading/format.
- Reviewed tj primitives: Reveal, Eyebrow, Money, CountUp. Reviewed EquityCurve + MiniCalendar chart components. Reviewed MarketBackground + SlowMoChart animation components.
- Verified parent context in AppDemo.tsx: DashboardPage renders inside `h-[640px] overflow-y-auto custom-scroll` with `motion.div key=page min-h-full` wrapper; root padding `p-5 md:p-6` per spec.
- OVERWROTE `/home/z/my-project/src/components/demo/pages/DashboardPage.tsx` (was a 9-line stub) with a full ~470-line production implementation. `export function DashboardPage()`. File is `"use client"` and bilingual via useLang().

  Five blocks, top to bottom:

  1. **Capture composer (hero)** — Reveal-wrapped Eyebrow + h1 headline. Glass card with `whileHover={{ y: -2 }}` spring lift, `relative overflow-hidden`. MarketBackground at opacity 0.06 absolutely positioned behind (density=48, speed=1.4, showEquityLine). Top row (flex-col → md:flex-row): Direction toggle (Long/Short) with `layoutId="dir-pill"` sliding pill (pos green for long, neg red for short), and a live Risk-$ readout (pulsing accent dot + `t("riskUsd")` label, big `text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold` Money value wrapped in `motion.div key={risk-${riskUsd}}` with spring pop on every value change). Form grid `grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3` with 8 fields: Instrument (native select from INSTRUMENTS), Setup (native select from SETUP_NAMES), Entry, Stop, Exit (`t("exit")`), Quantity, Risk-value (label changes per calc method, disabled when entryStop), RR (computed = |exit-entry|/|entry-stop|, color-coded pos/warn/neg). Inputs styled per spec (`bg-white/5 border hairline border-solid rounded-md h-9 px-3 text-sm tnum focus:border-tj-accent focus:bg-white/8`). Custom ChevronDown overlay on selects. Calc-method segmented control with 5 buttons + shared `layoutId="calc-pill"` sliding accent background. Drop-screens dashed zone (aria-label) + note textarea (`t("notePlaceholder")`). Two buttons: `t("registerTrade")` (accent, +icon) + `t("saveDraft")` (ghost, save icon). Register increments `registered` state which bumps sessionCount.

  2. **Sizing rail (5 modes)** — Horizontal strip of 5 pill buttons (`riskPercent`, `fixedUsd`, `forexLots`, `futuresContracts`, `entryStop`). Active = `bg-tj-accent/15 text-tj-accent border border-tj-accent/30`. Wired to the SAME `calcMethod` state as the composer's segmented control — clicking either updates both.

  3. **Results strip** — Compact glass card with 5 inline KPIs (flex-wrap, gap-x-8): Today's session + `tf("sessionCount", sessionCount)` (motion.div keyed on sessionCount for spring pop); Session P&L via Money colorizeSign sign; Trades count via CountUp; Win rate via CountUp (1 dec %, pos tone if ≥50%); Discipline via CountUp (0 dec %, pos tone).

  4. **Performance block** — Eyebrow `t("performance")` + h2 `t("performanceTitle")`. `grid lg:grid-cols-3`:
     - Chart card (lg:col-span-2): glass with SlowMoChart at opacity 0.10 absolutely positioned in background. Header shows "Curva de capital/Equity curve" + final balance (Money compact, text-2xl font-bold) + ROI % (fmtPct, colored pos/neg) + Equity/Drawdown legend. `<EquityCurve metrics={METRICS} height={220} />` below.
     - KPI sidebar (lg:col-span-1): 2-col grid of 8 KpiTile components. Each tile: subtle `bg-white/5 border hairline border-solid rounded-md p-3` with whileHover y:-2 lift. KPIs: pnlTotal (Money sign colorizeSign), winRate (CountUp 1 dec %), expectancy (Money sign colorizeSign), profitFactor (CountUp 2 dec), currentDd (Money of -currentDrawdown with colorizeSign → red), streak (custom "NW"/"NL"/"—" colored by streak.kind), discipline (CountUp 0 dec % pos), balance (Money compact).

  5. **P&L calendar** — Glass card with header ("Calendario P&L" + "Días operados" + winning/losing legend). `<MiniCalendar trades={TRADES} />` below.

  Risk-$ calculation logic (per calc method): riskPercent = balance × val/100; fixedUsd = val; forexLots = val × 100000 × stopDist; futuresContracts = val × 50 × stopDist; entryStop = stopDist × qty × (forex ? 100000 : 1). All reactive via useMemo.

  Selecting a different instrument auto-updates entry/stop/exit defaults based on the new instrument's basePrice and decimals.

- Quality gates verified:
  - `"use client"` ✓ (top of file)
  - Bilingual via useLang() ✓ — every label uses t() when a key exists; inline `es = lang === "es"` for the few strings without keys (Dirección, Sesión de hoy, P&L de la sesión, Operaciones, Curva de capital, etc.).
  - NO indigo/blue ✓ — only accent system (text-tj-accent, bg-tj-accent, border-tj-accent) and P&L colors (text-pnl-pos/neg/warn).
  - `tnum` on all numbers ✓ — inputCls includes tnum, all Money/CountUp outputs include tnum, manual tnum on RR display, streak label, ROI %.
  - Accessible ✓ — htmlFor/id labels on all inputs, role="radiogroup"+role="radio"+aria-checked on direction toggle, aria-pressed on calc segmented + sizing rail, aria-label on screenshot drop button, aria-hidden on decorative SVGs, semantic <section> wrappers.
  - Responsive ✓ — `grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3` form grid, `flex-col md:flex-row` composer top row, `grid lg:grid-cols-3` performance block (stacks on mobile/tablet), `grid-cols-2` KPI sidebar.
  - Animations ✓ — staggered Reveal on every block (delays 0 → 0.16), MarketBackground at 0.06 behind composer, SlowMoChart at 0.10 behind performance chart, sliding layoutId pills on direction toggle ("dir-pill") and calc segmented ("calc-pill"), spring-pop on risk-$ readout (keyed on value), CountUp on KPI numbers, whileHover y:-2/-3 lifts on glass cards, whileTap scale 0.98 on buttons.

- Ran `cd /home/z/my-project && bun run lint 2>&1 | tail -20` → zero errors, zero warnings (only "$ eslint ." with no output).
- Ran `bunx tsc --noEmit` filtered to DashboardPage.tsx → zero TypeScript errors in my file. (Pre-existing errors in MagneticButton.tsx, MarketBackground.tsx, skills/*, examples/* are out of scope.)
- Dev server log shows clean recompiles.

Stage Summary:
- `src/components/demo/pages/DashboardPage.tsx` shipped: a full, premium "Resumen/Dashboard" page that recreates the native WinUI trading-journal home in the browser. Composed of (1) a hero capture composer with live risk-$ readout and animated direction toggle, (2) a 5-mode sizing rail synced to the composer, (3) a session results strip, (4) a performance block with EquityCurve + 8-KPI sidebar, and (5) a P&L MiniCalendar.
- All required design tokens consumed: .glass, .eyebrow, .hairline, .pill, .text-primary/.secondary/.tertiary, .rounded-card, .tnum, .custom-scroll, bg-tj-accent, bg-tj-accent-hover, text-pnl-pos/neg/warn, border-tj-accent, text-tj-accent.
- All required primitives used: Reveal, Eyebrow, Money, CountUp, EquityCurve, MiniCalendar, MarketBackground, SlowMoChart. Framer Motion: motion, layoutId for sliding pills, whileHover/whileTap, spring transitions, key-based re-mount for value pops.
- All translation keys from the spec are exercised: captureHeadline, captureEyebrow, long, short, instrument, setup, exit, quantity, rr, calcMethod, riskPercent, fixedUsd, forexLots, futuresContracts, entryStop, registerTrade, saveDraft, sessionCount, riskUsd, performanceTitle, pnlTotal, winRate, expectancy, profitFactor, currentDd, streak, discipline, balance, performance (plus dropScreens and notePlaceholder from STR).
- Lint + TypeScript clean. Already wired into AppDemo.tsx (page === "dashboard" && <DashboardPage />).

Task ID: 5-d
Agent: demo-analytics
Task: Build the demo Analytics page

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md, then explored the design system: globals.css tokens, lib/trading/data.ts (computeMetrics, rHistogram, pnlHistogram, durationHistogram, weekdayBreakdown, monthlyBreakdown, rankByExpectancy, INSTRUMENTS, SETUP_NAMES), lib/trading/format.ts (fmtMoney/Num/Pct/Int), components/charts/{Histogram,Heatmap}, components/tj/{Eyebrow,Chip,Money,CountUp,Reveal,SlowMoChart}, components/demo/DemoContext (useDemo: filters/setFilters/clearFilters), and existing TradesPage.tsx for the FilterChip / glass / layout conventions.
- OVERWROTE src/components/demo/pages/AnalyticsPage.tsx (was a stub) with a full data-rich analytics page. Single source of truth: filteredTrades = TRADES filtered by DemoContext filters; m = computeMetrics(filteredTrades); all charts/histograms/rankings are useMemo-derived from filteredTrades (no setState in effects → lint-safe under react-hooks/set-state-in-effect).
- Sections built (top → bottom):
  1. STICKY FILTER BAR — glass card, sticky top-0 z-10, full bleed (-mx-5/-mt-5). Contains: instrument <select> (All + INSTRUMENTS), setup <select> (All + SETUP_NAMES), direction chips All/Long/Short via FilterChip with shared layoutId `analytics-filter-direction`, compliance chips All/Complied/Not via FilterChip with `analytics-filter-compliance`, live "Operations: N" counter, conditional clearFilters button.
  2. HEADER — Eyebrow + h1 title + desc, with SlowMoChart at opacity 0.06 behind it (absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none).
  3. KPI GRID — RISK & QUALITY: glass card holding a 2/4-col responsive grid of 8 KpiTiles (avgWin, avgLoss, payoff, expectancyR, largestWin, largestLoss, profitFactor, recoveryFactor). Each tile = label (tertiary 10px uppercase), big tnum value, optional inline Sparkline (custom tiny SVG from sparkPnl/sparkR/sparkEquity), whileHover lift, accent gradient top-border on hover. Tiles are keyed with filterSig so CountUp remounts and re-animates on filter change. Shows ⚠ sampleShort warn chip when closedCount<30.
  4. RATIOS ROW — glass card, 2/3/6-col responsive grid of 6 ratio tiles: Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar (CountUp 2dp colored), maxDrawdown (Money neg), maxDrawdownPct (pct warn-colored), expectancy (Money sign colorize). Each tile stagger-fades in (whileInView). sampleShort warn chip duplicated here.
  5. WINNERS vs LOSERS — 1-col card with custom WinnersDonut: SVG with loss background ring + animated win arc (stroke-dashoffset from circ→0, easeOutExpo 1.1s), center shows animated CountUp win-rate %. Legend below with colored dots + counts.
  6. R-OVER-TIME — 2-col card with custom ROverTimeChart: SVG scatter/bar of every trade as a vertical bar from baseline (y=plotH/2), colored by sign, framer-motion staggered scaleY animation (transformOrigin baseline). Tooltips via <title>. Horizontal scroll on overflow.
  7. DISTRIBUTIONS — 3 cards (lg:grid-cols-3): rDistribution (Histogram, pos-neg, formatX → `${x}R`), pnlDistribution (Histogram, pos-neg, formatX → compact money), durationDistribution (Histogram, accent, formatX → string label). All via the shared Histogram component which already staggers grow-in.
  8. WEEKDAY + MONTH — 2-col grid: WeekdayBars (7 horizontal bars, animated widths, day label + bar + signed $ value), MonthlyBars (SVG vertical bars from baseline, animated scaleY, month labels under each bar). Both color pos/neg.
  9. HEATMAP — full-width glass card with the Heatmap component (already animates each cell).
  10. RANKINGS — 2-col grid: RankingCard for setupsByExpectancy (rankByExpectancy(filteredTrades, t=>t.setup)) and instrumentsByExpectancy (rankByExpectancy(filteredTrades, t=>t.instrument)). Each row: rank #, name, count chip, win-rate %, signed expectancy $ (colored), and an animated bar width ∝ |expectancy|/maxAbs. Re-keyed by filterSig so bars re-animate on filter change.
- Animation strategy implemented exactly as specified: layoutId chip sliding, CountUp re-mounts on filterSig, donut stroke-dashoffset draw-in, staggered histogram/bar growth, ranking bar width animations, Reveal wrappers staggering sections, SlowMoChart bg behind header at 0.06 opacity, accent gradient hover-glow on KPI tiles.
- Quality gates: "use client" ✓, bilingual via useLang() (t + lang) ✓, no indigo/blue (uses accent-base slate + pnl-pos/neg/warn tokens) ✓, tnum everywhere ✓, accessible (aria-label on selects, aria-pressed on chips, role="img" + aria-label on SVG charts, <title> tooltips on bars) ✓, responsive (grids collapse 2→4, 2→6, 1→2→3, 1→2 cols on mobile; selects compact on mobile) ✓.
- Verified: `bun run lint` exits 0 (clean). Dev server compiles AnalyticsPage cleanly (curl localhost:3000 → HTTP 200, dev.log shows "✓ Compiled" + "GET / 200" with no module errors related to AnalyticsPage).

Stage Summary:
- AnalyticsPage.tsx now exports a fully wired AnalyticsPage() that recomputes every metric, distribution, and ranking from DemoContext filters in real time.
- ~760 lines, self-contained, all derived data via useMemo (no effect-setState), all charts custom-built except Histogram/Heatmap (shared).
- Page is the most data-rich of the demo: 8 KPI tiles + 6 ratios + donut + R-over-time + 3 distributions + weekday bars + monthly bars + heatmap + 2 ranking cards, all re-animating on filter change.
- Lint clean, dev server happy, ready for the orchestrator's final review.

Task ID: 5-f
Agent: demo-playbook
Task: Build the demo Playbook page

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md to absorb prior agents' work (foundation design system, marketing sections, demo Trades / Trade Detail / Dashboard pages already shipped by 5-b, 5-c, 5-a). Inspected design tokens in globals.css (.glass, .chrome, .eyebrow, .hairline, .pill, .divider-grad, .text-gradient, .text-primary/.secondary/.tertiary, .rounded-card, .tnum, custom-scroll; Tailwind utilities bg-tj-accent, text-tj-accent, border-tj-accent, text-pnl-pos/neg/warn).
- Read trading data layer (`@/lib/trading/data`): `TRADES`, `SETUP_NAMES` (Ruptura, Pullback, Reversión, Tendencia, Rango), `computeMetrics` (returns `equityCurve`, `wins`, `losses`, `winRate`, `expectancy`, `netPnl`, `closedCount`), `rankByExpectancy(TRADES, t => t.setup)`. Read format helpers `fmtMoney`, `fmtInt`, `fmtPct`, `fmtNum` from `@/lib/trading/format`. Read `useLang()` shape `{ t, tf, lang }` and confirmed translation keys `playbookEyebrow`, `playbookTitle`, `playbookDesc`, `newSetup`, `sample`, `noTradesYet`, `rules` plus reused `expectancy`, `winRate`, `pnlTotal`.
- Read tj primitives: `Eyebrow`, `Money` (colorizeSign), `CountUp` (IntersectionObserver-triggered, supports tone), `Reveal` (whileInView stagger), `TiltCard` (3D rotateX/rotateY + glare via `useSpring`), `SlowMoChart` (SVG equity curve that redraws on a long loop). Read shadcn `Dialog` / `DialogContent` / `DialogHeader` / `DialogTitle` / `DialogTrigger` / `DialogClose` / `DialogFooter` / `DialogDescription` (already includes zoom-in-95 + fade-in on open).
- Verified parent layout: `AppDemo.tsx` renders PlaybookPage inside `h-[640px] overflow-y-auto custom-scroll` with `motion.div key=page min-h-full` wrapper. So root padding `p-5 md:p-6` per spec.
- OVERWROTE `/home/z/my-project/src/components/demo/pages/PlaybookPage.tsx` (was a 9-line stub) with a full ~530-line implementation. `export function PlaybookPage()`. File is `"use client"` and bilingual via `useLang()`.

  Four blocks, top to bottom:

  1. **Header** — `relative mb-6 overflow-hidden rounded-card` with `SlowMoChart` absolutely positioned at opacity 0.06 behind (cycle=18s, points=110 for a denser curve). Foreground is a `flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-end md:justify-between gap-4`:
     - Left: `Reveal`-wrapped `Eyebrow` (`t("playbookEyebrow")` → "Biblioteca" / "Library"), `h1` `t("playbookTitle")` (text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold), and `t("playbookDesc")` paragraph (text-sm text-secondary).
     - Right: a `NewSetupDialog` whose trigger is a `MagneticTrigger` (custom inline forwardRef-less magnetic button using `useState({x,y})` + `animate` spring; strength 0.3) styled as `bg-tj-accent text-primary-foreground` with a `Plus` lucide icon and `t("newSetup")` label. The button has an accent shadow that intensifies on hover.

  2. **Summary band** — `grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-6`. Three glass `SummaryStat` cards (each `Reveal`-wrapped with staggered delays 0.05 / 0.10 / 0.15 and `whileHover y:-2` lift):
     - **Mejor setup / Best setup**: from `rankByExpectancy(TRADES, t => t.setup)[0]` — shows the setup name with a colored dot using the setup's hue, plus its expectancy via `Money colorizeSign sign`.
     - **Más operado / Most traded**: from `[...ranking].sort((a,b) => b.count - a.count)[0]` — setup name + count via `CountUp` (animated).
     - **Setups totales / Total setups**: `SETUP_NAMES.length` (= 5) via `CountUp`, with a small `Sparkles` lucide icon and bilingual subtitle "Vivos, con métricas en tiempo real".

  3. **Setup cards grid** — `grid sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4`. For each of the 5 `SETUP_NAMES`, a `SetupCard` is rendered (5 cards) plus a 6th dashed-border CTA card that also opens `NewSetupDialog` (fills the 3×2 grid on lg, no awkward empty slot).

  4. **NewSetupDialog** — shadcn `Dialog` with `DialogContent` (overridden `glass border-tj-accent/30 sm:max-w-md`). Trigger can be either the magnetic button (header) or the dashed CTA card. Inside: a form with Name input, Description textarea, 3 Rule inputs (placeholder "Regla 1/2/3" / "Rule 1/2/3"), Cancel + Save buttons. Save is wrapped in `DialogClose asChild` so it closes the dialog (visually complete, non-persistent per spec). Inputs styled to match DashboardPage (`bg-white/5 border hairline border-solid rounded-md h-9 px-3 text-sm focus:border-tj-accent focus:bg-white/8`). Has `DialogTitle` (sr-only label) and `DialogDescription` for screen readers.

  **Per-setup metadata** (`SETUP_META` map): each of the 5 setups gets a distinct hue (NO indigo / blue):
  - Ruptura → emerald `16 185 129`
  - Pullback → amber `245 158 11`
  - Reversión → rose `244 63 94`
  - Tendencia → gold accent `var(--accent-base)`
  - Rango → teal `20 184 166`

  Plus a bilingual description and 4 bilingual rules per setup (e.g. Ruptura: "Nivel claro probado 2+ veces", "Volumen creciente en la rotura", "Re-test aceptado como nuevo soporte", "Stop debajo del nivel roto"). Hue is stored as either a CSS rgb-triple string or `var(--accent-base)` and substituted into `rgb(<hue>)`, `rgb(<hue> / 0.14)` (tint), `rgb(<hue> / 0.45)` (glow) via inline styles + a `--card-glow` CSS custom property.

  **SetupCard structure** (glass, `rounded-card p-5`, `flex flex-col gap-4`):
  - **Accent top-edge tint**: 1px gradient line `linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, <hue>, transparent)`.
  - **Header**: 40×40 rounded glyph chip (`backgroundColor: tintCss`, `color: colorCss`, `borderColor: rgb(<hue>/0.3)`) housing a custom 16×16 `SetupGlyph` SVG (per-setup: arrow-through-line for Ruptura, zigzag for Pullback, U-turn for Reversión, rising diagonal for Tendencia, parallel-lines-with-bars for Rango — all `stroke="currentColor"` so they inherit the hue). Beside it: setup name (text-lg font-semibold text-primary) + 1-line description (text-xs text-tertiary line-clamp-1). Right side: `t("sample")` label + `fmtInt(metrics.closedCount)` value, OR `t("noTradesYet")` muted if 0 trades.
  - **Sparkline**: 100×28 viewBox SVG built from `metrics.equityCurve.map(p => p.balance)` via a `buildSparkPath` helper (handles empty / single-point with a flat line). `motion.path` with `initial={{pathLength:0, opacity:0}} animate={{pathLength:1, opacity:1}}` over 1.1s, `key={replayKey}` so it remounts and re-animates on every hover enter (`onHoverStart={() => setReplayKey(k => k+1)}`). `stroke="currentColor"` colored by the setup hue, `vectorEffect="non-scaling-stroke"` for crisp rendering under `preserveAspectRatio="none"`.
  - **Live stats row**: 3-col grid — expectancy (`Money sign colorizeSign`), win rate (`CountUp to={winRate*100} decimals={1} suffix="%"` tone pos/neg based on ≥50%), total P&L (`Money sign colorizeSign`).
  - **Win/loss bar**: header row "Ganadoras / Perdedoras" with `wins / losses` count (pos/neg colored). Below, an `h-1.5 rounded-full overflow-hidden bg-white/5` track containing two `motion.div` segments (`bg-pnl-pos` and `bg-pnl-neg`) animating `width: 0 → ${winPct}%` / `${lossPct}%` with staggered delays (0.35 + index*0.06 and 0.5 + index*0.06) and the `[0.22, 1, 0.36, 1]` easing. If total=0, a single `bg-white/10 w-full` flat bar. Has `role="img"` + `aria-label` for screen readers.
  - **Divider** (`.divider-grad`).
  - **Rules checklist**: small hue-colored square accent + `t("rules")` eyebrow. Then a `<ul>` of 4 rules, each a `<li>` with a 14×14 hue-tinted rounded checkbox (containing a `Check` lucide icon in the hue color) + the rule text in `text-xs text-secondary`.

  **Animations (all mandatory ones implemented):**
  - Cards staggered reveal on scroll: `Reveal delay={index * 0.07}` per card.
  - `TiltCard` 3D tilt + glare on every setup card (`max={7}`, `glare={0.16}`).
  - Sparklines draw in with `pathLength: 0 → 1` and replay on hover (via `key={replayKey}` remount).
  - Win/loss bars animate width on mount with staggered delays.
  - `CountUp` on win rate, most-traded count, total setups.
  - `newSetup` button: magnetic hover via `MagneticTrigger` (translates toward cursor with spring).
  - Modal: scale + fade in (built into shadcn DialogContent's `data-[state=open]:zoom-in-95 fade-in-0`).
  - `SlowMoChart` at opacity 0.06 behind the header.
  - Card hover: `whileHover={{ y: -4 }}` spring lift + accent-glow shadow via `hover:shadow-[0_12px_44px_-12px_var(--card-glow)]` where `--card-glow = rgb(<hue> / 0.45)`.
  - Summary stat cards: `whileHover={{ y: -2 }}` subtle lift.
  - CTA card: icon `group-hover:scale-110` and border intensifies on hover.

- Quality gates verified:
  - `"use client"` ✓ (top of file)
  - Bilingual ✓ — every label uses `t()` when a key exists; inline `es = lang === "es"` for the ~10 strings without keys (Mejor setup, Más operado, Setups totales, en tu playbook, Vivos con métricas en tiempo real, Ganadoras / Perdedoras, operaciones, trades, Nombre, Descripción, Regla N, Guardar ficha, Cancelar, Define tu setup…).
  - NO indigo / blue ✓ — only the accent system (`bg-tj-accent`, `text-tj-accent`, `border-tj-accent`) and P&L colors (`text-pnl-pos/neg/warn`), plus 5 distinct per-setup hues chosen from emerald / amber / rose / gold-accent / teal.
  - `tnum` ✓ — on all numeric cells (Money already includes `tnum`; CountUp already includes `tnum`; manual `tnum` on the sample count, win/loss count, dialog inputs).
  - Accessible ✓ — semantic `<section>` + `<article>` + `<header>` + `<ul>/<li>`; `aria-label` on each setup card and on the win/loss bar (`role="img"`); `aria-label` on each rule input; `<label htmlFor>` on Name/Description; `DialogTitle` + `DialogDescription` for the modal; `aria-hidden` on every decorative SVG (glyphs, sparkline, top-edge tint, dot accents); form `onSubmit={e => e.preventDefault()}` to prevent accidental navigation.
  - Responsive ✓ — `grid sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3` for the cards grid; `grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3` for the summary band; `flex-col md:flex-row` for the header; sparkline `w-full h-8`; inputs are `w-full`; CTA card uses `min-h-[260px]` to match neighbor card heights.
  - No `react-hooks/set-state-in-effect` ✓ — the only `useState` calls are: `replayKey` (updated in `onHoverStart` event handler, not in an effect) and `MagneticTrigger`'s `offset` (updated in `onMouseMove` event handler). No `useEffect` in the file at all.

- Ran `cd /home/z/my-project && bun run lint 2>&1 | tail -20` → zero errors, zero warnings (output was just `$ eslint .` with no diagnostics).
- Ran `bunx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | rg -i "PlaybookPage"` → zero TypeScript errors in the file.
- Dev server log shows clean recompiles, no errors.

Stage Summary:
- `src/components/demo/pages/PlaybookPage.tsx` shipped: a premium "Playbook" page that turns the trading playbook from "a dead PDF" into a library of setup cards with live, computed-from-trades statistics. Composed of (1) a SlowMoChart-backed header with eyebrow + title + description and a magnetic accent "New setup" button that opens a shadcn Dialog, (2) a 3-card summary band (best setup by expectancy / most-traded / total setups) with CountUp animations, (3) a 3×2 grid of 5 setup cards + 1 dashed CTA card, where each setup card is a TiltCard-wrapped glass card with a hue-coded glyph, a sparkline of the setup's equity curve (draws in with pathLength, replays on hover), live expectancy / win rate / total P&L stats, an animated win/loss bar, and a 4-rule bilingual checklist.

(`.pill`, `.chrome`, `.text-gradient` not needed for this page's content.)
- All required primitives used: `Eyebrow`, `Money`, `CountUp`, `Reveal`, `TiltCard`, `SlowMoChart`. Framer Motion: `motion.div` / `motion.button` / `motion.path` / `motion.div` segments, `whileHover` lift, `animate` for pathLength + width, `key={replayKey}` for sparkline replay, spring transitions.

Inline `es = lang === "es"` for the few strings without keys (intro paragraph, "Live preview", "Equity/Curva", sample-data description, "Made with…", build info labels, license labels).

  Five numbered sections, top to bottom, plus a header:

  **Header** — Reveal-wrapped Eyebrow (`t("settingsEyebrow")`) + h1 (`t("settingsTitle")`) + intro paragraph. `SlowMoChart` absolutely positioned behind the header at opacity 0.06 (cycle 18s) inside a `pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-40 -z-10` wrapper.

  1. **Language (`01 · t("language")`)** — `role="radiogroup"` grid-cols-2 of two big 68px-tall toggle buttons ("Español" / "English"). Each button has a circular "ES"/"EN" code badge (border-tj-accent/30 when inactive, white/40 when active) + the language name. Active state = `layoutId="lang-pill"` sliding `bg-tj-accent` fill that springs between the two via spring (380/32). Text/icon colors flip to `text-primary-foreground` when active. Inactive buttons have a subtle `hover:bg-tj-accent/[0.06]` wash and `hover:border-tj-accent/30` border.

  2. **Appearance (`02 · t("appearance")`)** — Two pieces:
     - Theme toggle: `role="radiogroup"` grid-cols-2 of two 56px-tall buttons (light/dark) with custom inline SunIcon/MoonIcon SVGs. Active state = `layoutId="theme-pill"` sliding `bg-tj-accent` fill (same spring as language pill). `aria-label={t("light")}/{t("dark")}`.
     - **Live preview card**: a `glass rounded-card` containing (a) header with pulsing green dot + "Vista previa en vivo/Live preview" eyebrow + a `pill` showing the current palette name, (b) a big +$2,847.50 P&L figure in `text-pnl-pos` (text-3xl md:text-[2.5rem] font-bold tnum) that re-animates (key on theme+palette) when either changes, (c) subtitle row with "Today · 4 trades" + "Discipline 92%" with accent dot, (d) a `MiniSparkline` inline SVG that draws in via `pathLength: 0→1` (1.1s, ease) using `rgb(var(--accent-base))` for stroke + gradient fill — so the sparkline color visibly transitions when the palette changes, (e) bottom KPI strip (Win rate / Expectancy / Profit factor) separated by a hairline divider. Two absolute overlays on top: a `key={`shimmer-${theme}`}` motion.div that sweeps a 110°-gradient accent highlight across the card on every theme switch (initial x:-100% opacity:0.85 → animate x:100% opacity:0, 0.95s), and a `key={`flash-${palette}`}` radial-gradient motion.div that flashes softly (opacity 0.55→0, 0.7s) on every palette switch.

  3. **Accent color (`03 · t("accentColor")`)** — `role="radiogroup"` grid (3 cols mobile, 5 cols sm+). Each of the 5 PALETTES renders as a `motion.button` with staggered spring entrance (delay 0.2 + i*0.06, spring 320/22), `whileHover={{ y: -2 }}` and `whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}`. The swatch is a 56px circle with a `linear-gradient(135deg, ${p.dark} → ${p.light})` fill + an inset box-shadow highlight (top white 0.35, bottom dark 0.25) for a glassy 3D look. The swatch scales to 1.10 on `group-hover`. Behind each swatch: a blurred radial glow (`blur-xl`) tinted with the palette's `dark` hex that fades in on hover/active (`opacity 0 → 0.5`). Active swatch: a `layoutId="palette-active-ring"` motion.span positioned around the swatch with `boxShadow: 0 0 0 2px rgb(var(--accent-base)), 0 0 24px rgb(var(--accent-base) / 0.35)` — slides between palettes with a spring (400/30) AND its color smoothly transitions as the CSS vars update. The active check mark (`CheckIcon`) is wrapped in `AnimatePresence` and pops in with a stiff spring (520/22, scale 0→1). Label below in `text-tj-accent` when active, `text-secondary group-hover:text-primary` otherwise.

  4. **Sample data (`04 · t("sampleData")`)** — Glass card with a flex-col → md:flex-row layout. Left side: explanation paragraph + a row of metadata chips (60 trades · 12 instruments · 3 months · Deterministic) with a `bg-pnl-pos` dot. Right side: a ghost `motion.button` (min-w-200px, h-11, hairline border, bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/8) with `AnimatePresence mode="wait"` cross-fading between three states: (a) **idle** — RefreshIcon (accent) + `t("loadSample")`, (b) **loading** — a spinning accent ring (rotating 360°/0.9s linear infinite) + "Cargando…/Loading…", (c) **loaded** — CheckIcon + "✓ Cargado/✓ Loaded" in `text-pnl-pos`. Click handler sets state to "loading" (450ms) → "loaded" (2.15s) → "idle". No useEffect/setStateInEffect — all via setTimeout callbacks in the click handler.

  5. **About (`05 · t("about")`)** — Glass card with: (a) info icon (accent-tinted square) + `t("aboutHelp")` text, (b) 4-column build-info grid (Version 2.4.1 · Build 2024.11.07 · Platform "Windows · Web" · Languages "ES · EN") each in a subtle `bg-white/[0.04]` hairline-bordered tile, (c) a `divider-grad`, (d) bottom row with "Made with ❤ for the serious manual trader" using inline HeartIcon (accent), and three social icon buttons (GitHub → real repo URL, X/Twitter, Globe website) as `motion.a` with `whileHover y:-2 scale:1.05` and accent hover styling, (e) a footer hairline row with copyright + "Personal license" pill + "Activated" status with pulsing green dot.

- **Custom inline icons**: SunIcon, MoonIcon, CheckIcon, RefreshIcon, GithubIcon, XIcon, GlobeIcon, HeartIcon — all hand-crafted SVGs using `currentColor` so they inherit the accent/text color system. No external icon library needed (cleaner + matches prior agents' convention).

- **MiniSparkline component**: deterministic 14-point equity curve rendered as inline SVG with a `pathLength` draw-in (1.1s, ease) + a fading area fill (`linear-gradient` accent 0.42 → 0) + an end dot that pops in with a stiff spring (500/18) at delay 1.35s. Stroke uses `rgb(var(--accent-base))` so it visibly recolors when the palette changes.

- **SettingSection helper component**: wraps each section in `Reveal` (y:18) with staggered delays (0 → 0.05 → 0.10 → 0.15 → 0.20 → 0.25), shows a numbered eyebrow ("01"…"05" in `text-tj-accent`) + the section title in `text-tertiary uppercase tracking-[0.12em]` + a flex-1 `divider-grad` line filling the rest of the row.

- Quality gates verified:
  - `"use client"` ✓ (top of file)
  - Bilingual via useLang() ✓ — every label uses t() when a key exists; inline `es = lang === "es"` for the few strings without keys (intro paragraph, "Vista previa en vivo/Live preview", "Curva/Equity", sample-data description, "Hecho con/Made with…", build info labels, license labels).
  - NO indigo/blue ✓ — only accent system (text-tj-accent, bg-tj-accent, border-tj-accent) and P&L colors (text-pnl-pos). Palette swatch gradients use the PALETTES hex values (gold/esmeralda/ónix/aurora/seda — no blue).
  - `tnum` on all numbers ✓ — P&L figure, KPI values, win rate, expectancy, profit factor, build version/build numbers, "60 trades", "12 instruments", "3 months", "92%", language code badges (ES/EN).
  - Accessible ✓ — `role="radiogroup"` + `role="radio"` + `aria-checked` on language/theme/palette toggles, `aria-label` on every toggle button (using the translated label), `aria-hidden="true"` on all decorative SVGs and the background SlowMoChart, semantic `<header>`/`<section>` wrappers, `type="button"` on all buttons, `target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"` on external links, `disabled` state on the loadSample button while loading/loaded.
  - Responsive ✓ — `grid-cols-2` for language/theme toggles, `grid-cols-3 sm:grid-cols-5` for palette swatches, `grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4` for build info, `flex-col md:flex-row` for sample-data card, `flex-col sm:flex-row` for about footer, `text-3xl md:text-[2.5rem]` for the preview P&L, `w-32 md:w-36` for the sparkline.
  - Animations ✓ — staggered Reveal on every section (delays 0 → 0.25), `layoutId="lang-pill"` sliding language selection, `layoutId="theme-pill"` sliding theme selection, `layoutId="palette-active-ring"` sliding palette ring, palette swatches staggered spring entrance + hover y:-2 + whileTap scale:0.95 + active check pop, MiniSparkline `pathLength` draw-in + end-dot spring, SlowMoChart at opacity 0.06 behind the header, theme-switch shimmer overlay (keyed on theme, sweeps 110° accent gradient across the preview card), palette-switch radial flash overlay (keyed on palette, opacity 0.55→0), loadSample button AnimatePresence cross-fade between idle/loading/loaded, social links hover y:-2 scale:1.05, pulsing green status dots.
  - No `react-hooks/set-state-in-effect` ✓ — `sampleState` is set inside the click handler via `setTimeout` callbacks (not in a useEffect body).

- Ran `cd /home/z/my-project && bun run lint 2>&1 | tail -20` → zero errors, zero warnings (clean `$ eslint .` with no output). Ran `bunx tsc --noEmit` filtered to SettingsPage.tsx → zero TypeScript errors in my file. (Pre-existing errors in MagneticButton.tsx, MarketBackground.tsx, ParticleField.tsx, SlowMoChart.tsx, skills/*, examples/* are out of scope per prior agents' notes.) Dev server log shows clean recompiles.

Stage Summary:
- `src/components/demo/pages/SettingsPage.tsx` shipped: a premium, motion-rich "Ajustes/Settings" page that makes the theme/palette switcher the star of the show. Five numbered sections (Language, Appearance, Accent color, Sample data, About) plus a SlowMoChart-backed header.
- The live preview card is the centerpiece: it reflects the current theme/palette instantly (CSS vars transition), with a P&L figure that re-animates, an accent-colored equity sparkline that recolors with the palette, a sweeping shimmer on theme switches, and a radial flash on palette switches.
- All 5 accent palettes (oro/esmeralda/onix/aurora/seda) render as gradient-filled circular swatches with staggered entrance, hover scale + glow, a sliding layoutId ring on the active one, and a popping check mark.
- Language and theme toggles both use shared-layout `layoutId` pills for buttery-smooth selection sliding.
- The loadSample button cross-fades between idle/loading/loaded states (with a spinning accent ring during loading and a "✓ Cargado/✓ Loaded" success state for ~2s) without any setState-in-effect.
- All required design tokens consumed: .glass, .eyebrow, .hairline, .pill, .divider-grad, .text-gradient (unused — no gradient text needed), .text-primary/.secondary/.tertiary, .rounded-card, .tnum, bg-tj-accent, text-pnl-pos/neg/warn, border-tj-accent, text-tj-accent.
- All required primitives used: Reveal, Eyebrow, SlowMoChart. Framer Motion: motion, AnimatePresence, layoutId for sliding pills/ring, whileHover/whileTap, spring transitions, key-based remounts for one-shot overlays, pathLength for sparkline draw-in.
- All translation keys from the spec exercised: settingsEyebrow, settingsTitle, language, appearance, light, dark, accentColor, sampleData, loadSample, about, aboutHelp, palGold, palEmerald, palOnyx, palAurora, palSilk (plus pnlTotal/winRate/expectancy/profitFactor/rights for the preview KPIs).
- Lint + TypeScript (file-scoped) clean. Already wired into AppDemo.tsx (page === "settings" && <SettingsPage />).

Task ID: 5-e
Agent: demo-journal
Task: Build the demo Journal page

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md to absorb prior agents' context (foundation design system, marketing sections, demo Trades 5-b, Trade Detail 5-c, Dashboard 5-a). Inspected globals.css design tokens (.glass, .chrome, .eyebrow, .hairline, .pill, .divider-grad, .text-gradient, .text-primary/.secondary/.tertiary, .rounded-card, .tnum, .custom-scroll, Tailwind tokens text-tj-accent / bg-tj-accent / text-pnl-pos/neg/warn / text-signal-green/amber/red).
- Reviewed i18n keys: journalEyebrow, journalTitle, ritualTitle, preMarket, postMarket, dayScore, freeNote, disciplineReport, compliancePct, costOfIndiscipline, expInPlan, expOutPlan, review2, weekly, monthly, history, complied/notComplied, partial. Reviewed trading data: TRADES, METRICS (compliancePct, costOfIndiscipline, expectancyInPlan, expectancyBrokePlan), weekdayBreakdown ({day,pnl}[]), monthlyBreakdown ({month,pnl}[]). Reviewed format helpers fmtInt, fmtDate, fmtMoney. Reviewed tj primitives: Eyebrow, Chip (pos/neg/warn/accent/neutral/default), Money (sign, compact, colorizeSign), CountUp (IntersectionObserver-driven, tone), Reveal (whileInView stagger wrapper), PremiumCard (.glass .rounded-card), SlowMoChart (SVG path animated).
- Verified parent context in AppDemo.tsx: JournalPage renders inside `h-[640px] overflow-y-auto custom-scroll` with `motion.div key=page min-h-full` wrapper; root padding `p-5 md:p-6` per spec.
- OVERWROTE `src/components/demo/pages/JournalPage.tsx` (was a 9-line stub) with a full implementation, `export function JournalPage()`. File is `"use client"` and bilingual via `useLang()`.

  Five blocks, top to bottom:

  1. **Header** (Reveal delay 0) — `Eyebrow t("journalEyebrow")` + `h1 t("journalTitle")` (text-2xl md:text-3xl, font-semibold, tracking-tight).

  2. **Daily ritual card** (Reveal delay 0.05, `PremiumCard p-5 md:p-6`) — `t("ritualTitle")` heading with a small accent bar + "Hoy"/"Today" pill. Two-column `grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 md:gap-8` via `RitualColumn` component (one for `t("preMarket")` accent-colored, one for `t("postMarket")` pnl-pos-colored). Each column contains:
     - Header with colored dot, title, and a `pill` showing checked/total count.
     - A 4-item checklist (`PRE_ITEMS` / `POST_ITEMS`) where each row is a `<button aria-pressed>` with an `AnimatedCheckbox` SVG (`motion.path` with `pathLength: 0 → 1` when checked, accent-colored for pre, pnl-pos for post).
     - A `DayScoreDots` (0-5) row with `role="radiogroup"` + `role="radio"` + `aria-checked`. Each dot is a `motion.button` with spring-animated fill (accent when active, dim white when not) and a `layoutId`-keyed ring on the selected dot (unique per column via `idPrefix` prop).
     - A `<textarea>` with `htmlFor`/`id` label `t("freeNote")`, bilingual placeholder.
     - Vertical divider (desktop, `bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent via-white/15 to-transparent`) absolute-positioned at `left-1/2`; horizontal divider on mobile (`md:hidden col-span-full`).

  3. **Discipline report — HERO** (Reveal delay 0.1, `PremiumCard relative overflow-hidden p-5 md:p-8`) — the centerpiece of the page:
     - `SlowMoChart` at `opacity={0.06}` absolute-positioned in background (cycle 18s, 120 points for denser texture).
     - Top row: `t("disciplineReport")` heading with amber accent bar + `TrafficLight` component on the right.
     - 3-column grid (`md:grid-cols-3 gap-6 md:gap-8 items-center`):
       - **Col 1: `ComplianceRing`** — SVG circular progress (`r=52`, `strokeDasharray=circumference`, `motion.circle` animating `strokeDashoffset` from `C` (0%) to `C*(1-pct)` via `whileInView` with `viewport={{once:true}}`). Color & tone determined by `pct > 0.7 ? pos : pct > 0.5 ? warn : neg`. Big centered number via `CountUp` (0 decimals, `%` suffix, 1.4s) with `t("compliancePct")` label below.
       - **Col 2: Cost of indiscipline** — big dramatic red number. Triangle warning SVG icon (path + line + dot) + `t("costOfIndiscipline")` label, then `CountUp` (prefix `$`, 0 decimals, `duration={2.4}` for slow dramatic reveal, tone `text-pnl-neg`, `text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tnum`). Below: `COST_COPY` bilingual subtitle ("Lo que tu indisciplina te costó" / "What your indiscipline cost you").
       - **Col 3: Expectancy in-plan vs out-of-plan** — 2-column mini-stat grid: `expInPlan` (green-tinted card with `Money sign compact colorizeSign`) vs `expOutPlan` (red-tinted card with `Money sign compact colorizeSign`). Below: `DivergingBar` component — horizontal track with center zero line; green bar grows leftward from center (in-plan expectancy), red bar grows rightward from center (out-of-plan expectancy), both animate `width` from 0 via `whileInView`. Below: bilingual "En plan / In plan" ↔ "Fuera de plan / Out of plan" labels.
     - **`TrafficLight`** — 3 dots (green/amber/red) inside a `bg-black/30` pill. The active light (green if compliance > 0.7, amber if > 0.5, red otherwise) is full-opacity + scale 1; inactive lights are dim (opacity 0.2, scale 0.7). The active light has an additional pulsing halo `motion.span` with `animate={{ opacity: 0.55 → 0, scale: 1 → 2.6 }}` on infinite 1.6s repeat. `role="status"` + `aria-label`.

  4. **Review tabs** (Reveal delay 0.15, `PremiumCard p-5 md:p-6`) — `t("review2")` heading with a segmented tab control on the right (`role="tablist"` + `role="tab"` + `aria-selected`). Two tabs: `t("weekly")` / `t("monthly")`. Active tab uses `layoutId="review-tab-pill"` for a sliding accent background that springs between the two buttons. Content area wrapped in `AnimatePresence mode="wait"` keyed on `tab`, so the chart cross-fades (`opacity 0→1, y 8→0` and back) on each switch. Inside: `PnlBarChart` component — diverging-from-zero bar chart (positive bars grow upward from center, negative grow downward from center, hover reveals absolute value). Bars animate `height: 0 → pct/2%` with staggered delays. Bilingual legend below ("Positivo/Negativo" + colored squares).
     - `weekly` data: `weekdayBreakdown(TRADES).map(d => ({label: d.day, pnl: d.pnl}))` (7 bars: Lun..Dom).
     - `monthly` data: `monthlyBreakdown(TRADES).map(d => ({label: d.month, pnl: d.pnl}))` (only months with trades).

  5. **History timeline** (Reveal delay 0.2, `PremiumCard p-5 md:p-6`) — `t("history")` heading. `buildHistory(TRADES)` groups trades by `closedAt.toISOString().slice(0,10)`, sorts descending, takes top 6 days. For each entry computes: date, sumPnl, avgScore (rounded), compliancePct, count, first entryNote, overall compliance (yes if ≥0.8, partial if ≥0.5, else no). Rendered as a `<ul>` of `motion.li` cards with staggered entrance (`initial={{opacity:0, x:-10}}`, `whileInView`, `delay: 0.06*i`), each with:
     - Left border colored by P&L (`border-l-pnl-pos / -neg / -warn`).
     - `whileHover={{ y: -2 }}` lift + `hover:shadow-[0_10px_36px_-12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.55)]` glow.
     - Date pill (month abbrev + day number) on the left.
     - Center: fmtDate + count + day score (accent-colored) + first note (line-clamp-1).
     - Right: `Chip` (pos/warn/neg per compliance) + `Money value={sumPnl} sign colorizeSign` in tone-colored bold.

- Quality gates:
  - `"use client"` ✓ (top of file)
  - Bilingual ✓ — every label uses `t()` when a key exists; inline `lang === "es"` for the few strings without keys (pre/post checklist items, free-note placeholders, COST_COPY, "Hoy/Today", "Positivo/Negativo", "En plan/Fuera de plan", "ops./trades", traffic-light labels).
  - NO indigo/blue ✓ — only the accent system (text-tj-accent, bg-tj-accent, border-tj-accent), P&L colors (text-pnl-pos/neg/warn), and signal colors (text-signal-green/amber/red for the traffic light) are used.
  - `tnum` on all numbers ✓ — CountUp wraps in `tnum`, Money wraps in `tnum`, manually added `tnum` on day-score count pill, date pill, history entry's date/count/score, bar-chart hover value (via `fmtInt` + `tnum` class), bar-chart x-axis labels.
  - Accessible ✓ — `role="tablist"`/`role="tab"`/`aria-selected` on review tabs, `role="radiogroup"`/`role="radio"`/`aria-checked` on day-score dots, `aria-pressed` on checklist toggles, `role="status"`/`aria-label` on traffic light, `htmlFor`/`id` on note textareas, `aria-hidden="true"` on all decorative SVGs (checkmark path, warning triangle, SlowMoChart, compliance ring background), `<label>` for free-note textareas, semantic `<header>`/`<section>`/`<ul>`/`<li>`/`<h1>`/`<h2>`/`<h3>`.
  - Responsive ✓ — `md:grid-cols-2` (ritual) / `md:grid-cols-3` (discipline hero) / `md:hidden` mobile horizontal divider, `flex-wrap` on history entry metadata rows, `text-2xl md:text-3xl` on title, `text-4xl md:text-5xl` on cost-of-indiscipline, `w-40 h-40 md:w-44 md:h-44` on compliance ring, `gap-1.5 sm:gap-2` on bar chart.
  - Animations ✓ — staggered Reveal on every block (delays 0 → 0.2), SlowMoChart at 0.06 behind discipline report, animated SVG checkmarks (pathLength draw-in) on checklist toggle, spring-animated day-score dots with layoutId ring, compliance ring stroke-dashoffset animation via whileInView, dramatic CountUp on cost-of-indiscipline (2.4s slow ease), CountUp on compliancePct (1.4s), pulsing traffic-light halo (infinite repeat), diverging bar widths animate from 0 via whileInView, tab-pill layoutId slide between weekly/monthly, AnimatePresence cross-fade on tab content, staggered history-row reveal, hover lift + glow on history cards, bar-chart bars animate from 0 height on every tab switch (keyed on tab via AnimatePresence remount).
  - Avoided `react-hooks/set-state-in-effect` ✓ — zero `useEffect` calls in the file. All state updates happen in event handlers (onClick on checklist toggles, day-score dots, tab buttons; onChange on note textareas). In-view animations use framer-motion's `whileInView` (no manual IntersectionObserver) and the `CountUp` primitive manages its own observation internally.

- Fixed a TypeScript error during dev: `weekdayBreakdown` returns `{day, pnl}[]` and `monthlyBreakdown` returns `{month, pnl}[]`, but `PnlBarChart` expects `{label, pnl}[]`. Added `.map((d) => ({ label: d.day, pnl: d.pnl }))` / `.map((d) => ({ label: d.month, pnl: d.pnl }))` inside `useMemo` to normalize the shape.
- Final `cd /home/z/my-project && bun run lint 2>&1 | tail -20` → zero errors, zero warnings (only "$ eslint ." with no output). `bunx tsc --noEmit` filtered to JournalPage.tsx → zero TypeScript errors in my file. Dev server log shows clean recompiles.

Stage Summary:
- `src/components/demo/pages/JournalPage.tsx` shipped: a premium reflection-and-discipline page that recreates the journal ritual of the native WinUI trading app. Composed of (1) a header, (2) a daily-ritual card with two-column pre/post checklists + animated day-score dots + free-note textareas, (3) a hero Discipline Report with an animated SVG compliance ring, a dramatic slow-CountUp cost-of-indiscipline, an in-plan vs out-of-plan diverging bar, and a pulsing traffic light, (4) a Review tab card with sliding layoutId pill + animated diverging bar chart (weekly/monthly via weekdayBreakdown / monthlyBreakdown), and (5) a staggered history timeline derived from grouped TRADES.

- All required primitives used: Eyebrow, Chip, Money, CountUp, Reveal, PremiumCard, SlowMoChart. Framer Motion: motion, AnimatePresence, layoutId (review-tab-pill + day-score-ring per column), whileInView (ring stroke, diverging bar widths, history row reveal), whileHover/whileTap (cards, dots, tabs), spring transitions, infinite-repeat pulsing halo.
- All translation keys from the spec exercised: journalEyebrow, journalTitle, ritualTitle, preMarket, postMarket, dayScore, freeNote, disciplineReport, compliancePct, costOfIndiscipline, expInPlan, expOutPlan, review2, weekly, monthly, history, complied, notComplied, partial.

Task ID: 4-c

Task: Enhance StatsBand + Wrapped + SocialProof with cinematic animations

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md and the three target files (StatsBand.tsx, Wrapped.tsx, SocialProof.tsx) plus all animation primitives (MarketBackground, SlowMoChart, ParticleField, TiltCard, CountUp, Reveal, Money) to confirm prop surfaces and preserve all existing content/exports.
- StatsBand.tsx: layered MarketBackground (opacity 0.10, density 70, speed 1.4) and ParticleField (opacity 0.3, count 42) behind the band; added scroll-driven horizontal parallax via useScroll(target=section, offset ["start end","end start"]) + useTransform → x:[20,-20] on the inner max-w-page container; kept the existing CountUp usage (already triggers on scroll-into-view via IntersectionObserver); wrapped each stat in an inner motion.div with infinite subtle float y:[0,-4,0] staggered by index (duration 4+i*0.6, delay i*0.35); added a bottom accent gradient line that sweeps scaleX 0→1 with transformOrigin left on whileInView.
- Wrapped.tsx: added a SlowMoChart (opacity 0.08, cycle 18, points 110) absolutely positioned behind the section header inside a relative wrapper; wrapped every stat card body in TiltCard (max=7, glare=0.18) while keeping the outer motion.article for the entrance; switched entrance transition to spring (stiffness 220, damping 26) with staggered delay (i%3)*0.08; added whileHover y:-4 lift + an accent border-glow div (inset 1px accent + outer 28px glow, opacity 0→1 on group-hover); placed a MarketBackground (opacity 0.05, density 48, showEquityLine=false) absolutely behind the "streak" hero card; added a new local ConfettiBurst component (14 accent dots, randomized left/size/delay/duration/drift, animate y:[0,-190] + x drift + opacity [0,0.55,0], infinite) rendered only on the streak card. Preserved all existing card content, Money formatting, CountUp usage, and the footer note.
- SocialProof.tsx: added ParticleField (opacity 0.2, count 36) and SlowMoChart (opacity 0.05, cycle 20, points 100) as background layers (section set to overflow-hidden); wrapped each testimonial card in TiltCard (max=6, glare=0.15); added whileHover y:-4 lift + accent border-glow div on hover; converted the 5 star svgs to motion.svg with staggered pop-in (opacity/scale/rotate, delay 0.2+k*0.1+i*0.12); added an infinite pulse ring on each avatar (motion.span, border = t.hue, animate scale [1,1.7] + opacity [0.5,0], repeat Infinity, staggered delay i*0.4); converted the verified badge into a spring scale-in (delay 0.35+i*0.12) and the inner check path into a draw-in animation (pathLength 0→1, delay 0.55+i*0.12). Preserved all testimonial data, quote text, role text, and the years-trading pill.
- Ran `bun run lint` → exit 0, clean. Verified `bunx tsc --noEmit` produces zero errors in the three edited files (pre-existing TS strict-null errors in the primitive files MarketBackground/ParticleField/SlowMoChart are out of scope — task said preserve content of the three marketing files only).
- NO indigo/blue introduced; all accent work uses --accent-base / --pnl-pos / --pnl-warn tokens. All three files keep "use client".

Stage Summary:
- StatsBand now floats its 4 big CountUp stats over a live scrolling candlestick chart + particle constellation, with a scroll-bound horizontal parallax, per-stat infinite float, and a sweeping accent gradient line at the bottom.
- Wrapped gains a slow-drawing equity curve behind the header, 3D tilt + glare on every card, a live market chart + confetti burst behind the "best streak" hero card, spring entrances, hover lift, and accent border glow.
- SocialProof gains particle + equity-curve backdrops, 3D tilt cards, sequential star pop-ins, infinite avatar pulse rings, and a draw-in verified check — all on the existing accent palette.
- All existing exports (StatsBand, Wrapped, SocialProof), props, content, i18n keys, and Money formatting preserved verbatim. Lint clean.

The inner content wrapper (`max-w-page ...`) became a `motion.div` with `style={{ y: yParallax }}` for scroll-driven parallax. Section gained `overflow-hidden` + `ref={sectionRef}`.
  - Behind the header: absolutely-positioned `SlowMoChart` (`opacity={0.08}`, `cycle={16}`, `h-[320px]`, `pointer-events-none`, `aria-hidden`).

    * Animated accent gradient line on top: `motion.div` with `initial={{ scaleX: 0 }}`, `whileInView={{ scaleX: 1 }}`, `viewport={{ once: true, margin: "-60px" }}`, `transition={{ duration: 1.1, ease: [0.22,1,0.36,1], delay: 0.15 }}`, `style={{ transformOrigin: "left" }}`, `className="absolute left-0 right-0 top-0 z-10 h-px bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-tj-accent to-transparent"`.

Inside: `TiltCard max={6} glare={0.12} className="h-full rounded-card"` wrapping the existing `article` (which keeps its CSS `hover:border-tj-accent/60 hover:shadow-[...]` and `group` behavior).
  - Icon container upgraded from a plain `div` to `motion.div` with infinite float: `animate={{ y: [0, -3, 0] }}`, `transition={{ duration: 3, repeat: Infinity, ease: "easeInOut", delay: i * 0.2 }}`. Staggered delays per card so they don't all bob in sync. All existing className + group-hover styles preserved.

Task ID: 4-d
Agent: motion-story
