Task ID: R1-g
Agent: qa-faq-changelog-news
Task: Pixel-perfect review and fix of FAQ, Changelog, Newsletter

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md (history of prior QA rounds), then read all 3 target files plus their primitives (accordion.tsx, TiltCard.tsx, SlowMoChart.tsx, ParticleField.tsx, GlossaryModal.tsx, Chip.tsx, Reveal.tsx, Input/Button) and globals.css tokens to ground the review in the actual design system (accent-base CSS var, .glass/.aurora-bg/.rounded-card/.max-w-page/.tnum utilities, --color-tj-accent-hover Tailwind v4 token).
- Verified FAQ backdrop stack: ParticleField (absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none), SlowMoChart (absolute -inset-x-10 -inset-y-6 pointer-events-none), MarketBackground (absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none overflow-hidden rounded-card) — all clipped by section's overflow-hidden. Accordion already uses shadcn's animate-accordion-down/up for smooth height; chevron rotation handled by [&[data-state=open]>svg]:rotate-180; question hover color shift via hover:text-tj-accent hover:no-underline. All present and correct.
- FAQ fix 1: AccordionItem transition list expanded from `[border-color,box-shadow]` → `[border-color,box-shadow,background-color]` and added `data-[state=open]:bg-tj-accent/[0.04]` so the open item gets a subtle accent background tint in addition to the existing accent border + glow shadow — strengthens the "accent border glow on open item" visual.
- FAQ fix 2: Glossary modal trigger wrapper spacing mt-3 → mt-4 (12px → 16px) for slightly better breathing room below the "Didn't find your answer?" line; keeps the two contact prompts grouped while avoiding a cramped feel.
- Verified Changelog backdrop: aurora-bg (absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none opacity-40), SlowMoChart (absolute -inset-x-10 -inset-y-6 pointer-events-none) behind header. Center timeline line `absolute left-4 md:left-1/2 top-0 bottom-0 w-px md:-translate-x-1/2` matches dot positions. Mobile stacking verified: entries in `space-y-8`, card column has `pl-12` (48px) for the dot lane, dot at `left-4` (16px center) → no horizontal overlap with card content; cards stack vertically with no overlap.
- Verified Changelog dots: past = solid `bg-tj-accent` + ring + glow shadow; next/roadmap = hollow `border-2 border-tj-accent bg-background` ring with inner `animate-ping [animation-duration:2.4s]` pulse. Both render correctly.
- Verified Changelog scroll-driven animations: motion.div cards use `opacity` + `x` (transform-only), dots use `opacity` + `scale` (transform-only) — no layout shift. `viewport={{ once: true }}` ensures animations run once on entry.
- Changelog fix: Added `h-full` to the three-element chain (motion.div wrapper → TiltCard className → inner glass card div) per spec, so the TiltCard + card fill their flex cell. Defensive measure that propagates height correctly if items-stretch is ever enabled; no visual regression with current items-center.
- Verified Newsletter backdrop: aurora-bg (absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none), ParticleField (absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none), two accent glow Orbs (absolute, pointer-events-none, blur-[130px]). Section has `overflow-hidden` so the orbs' negative offsets (-top-32, bottom-[-140px], etc.) are clipped. Glass card `max-w-2xl mx-auto` centered. Email Input (h-12) + subscribe Button (h-12) consistent height; `hover:bg-tj-accent-hover` valid (maps to --color-tj-accent-hover token).
- Newsletter fix 1 (layout shift on success cross-fade — the main issue): wrapped the AnimatePresence in `<div className="min-h-[148px] flex flex-col justify-center">`. The form (~48px desktop / ~108px mobile) and success state (~136px: 68 SVG + 16 gap + 28 text + 24 py-3) now share a reserved 148px slot, so the unsubscribe note below no longer jumps ~88px when the form cross-fades to the success state. `justify-center` centers whichever state is active so the empty space is split evenly rather than堆积 at the bottom.
- Newsletter fix 2: added `sm:items-center` to the form so on desktop the input column and the subscribe button stay vertically centered within the reserved 148px slot (and remain aligned if the error helper pushes the input column taller than the button).
- Ran `bun run lint` (clean, no errors) and `bun run build` (compiled successfully in 9.4s, all 7 static pages generated).

Stage Summary:
- FAQ: accordion open item now has accent background tint in addition to accent border + glow; glossary trigger spacing nudged from mt-3 → mt-4. Backdrop stack (ParticleField + SlowMoChart + MarketBackground) and accordion mechanics (smooth height, chevron rotation, hover color shift) all verified correct.
- Changelog: TiltCard chain (motion.div → TiltCard → inner glass div) now carries `h-full` per spec. Mobile vertical stacking confirmed non-overlapping (pl-12 card column vs left-4 dot). Past/roadmap dots render correctly (solid vs hollow+pulse). Scroll animations are transform-only → no layout shift.
- Newsletter: success cross-fade no longer causes layout shift — reserved 148px slot via `min-h-[148px] flex flex-col justify-center` wrapper around AnimatePresence; form vertically centered with `sm:items-center`. Orbs contained by section overflow-hidden. Lint + build both green.

Task ID: R1-f
Agent: qa-trust-local-pricing
Task: Pixel-perfect review and fix of TrustStrip, LocalFirst, Pricing

Work Log:
- Read /home/z/my-project/worklog.md (1239 lines, full project context incl. R1-a..R1-d sibling QA passes) plus the 3 target files in full. Cross-referenced supporting primitives: TiltCard.tsx (no overflow-hidden, glare overlay at inset-0 rounded-[inherit]), CountUp.tsx (renders `<span className="tnum ${toneClass} ${className}">` — inline by default, becomes flex-item blockified when parent is flex), MagneticButton.tsx (x/y motion-values via useSpring → pure transforms, no layout shift), SlowMoChart.tsx (SVG preserveAspectRatio="none", useInView-guarded, pointer-events-none), MarketBackground.tsx (canvas, pointer-events-none, aria-hidden), ParticleField.tsx (canvas, pointer-events-none, aria-hidden), Reveal.tsx (passes className through to motion.div). Verified globals.css tokens: `.glass` = `background-color: rgb(var(--card) / 0.55)` + 1px accent border at 30% + border-radius:8px + `::before` 1px gradient border via mask; `.rounded-card` = 8px; `.section` = clamp(5rem,10vw,9rem) y-padding; `.section-tight` = clamp(3rem,6vw,5rem) y-padding; `--accent-base: 126 140 160` (default :root slate) with theme overrides at lines 178-214 (gold/esmeralda/ónix/aurora/seda — none indigo/blue); `.tnum` = tabular-nums.

- **TrustStrip.tsx** — fixed the dot-separator spacing imbalance. Original placed the trailing dot *inside* each item's `flex items-center gap-2` motion.div with `ml-6` (24px margin), which stacked on top of the parent's `gap-x-6` (24px) to produce 32px label→dot vs 24px dot→next-icon — the dot sat closer to the NEXT icon than to its own label, reading visually as a leading bullet for the next item rather than a separator. Refactored: wrapped each item + its trailing dot in `<Fragment key={item.label}>`, hoisted the dot OUT of the item's motion.div to be a sibling flex item, and removed `ml-6` from the dot. Now the parent `gap-x-6` provides uniform 24px spacing on both sides of the dot, centering it between items. Added `import { Fragment } from "react"`. Verified the dot remains `hidden md:inline-block` so on mobile the layout collapses to item-gap-item with no dot artifacts and wraps to ~2/row on a 360px screen (5 short items × ~124-134px each + 24px gaps → 2 items + 24px gap = ~280-290px fits, 3 items + 48px gaps = ~470-490px doesn't). Verified MarketBackground behind (`absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none` ✅), 5 trust items with pulsing icons (animate `scale: [1, 1.08, 1]` ✅), sweeping accent line at top (`absolute left-0 right-0 top-0 h-px pointer-events-none` ✅).

- **LocalFirst.tsx** — (1) SlowMoChart wrapper changed from `absolute -inset-x-8 -inset-y-6 pointer-events-none` → `absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none` so it's a proper full-column ambient layer matching the ParticleField wrapper (line 70) and the convention established in R1-c/R1-d. The previous `-inset-x-8 -inset-y-6` bled the chart 32px horizontally + 24px vertically beyond the left column into the section gutter; with opacity 0.05 the bleed was barely perceptible but inconsistent with the spec "absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none". (2) Added defensive containment for the circulating data-flow dots: defined `<clipPath id="lf-laptop-clip"><rect x="60" y="40" width="240" height="140" rx="8" /></clipPath>` in the SVG `<defs>` (matching the laptop body rect at lines 261-269) and applied `clipPath="url(#lf-laptop-clip)"` to the `<g>` wrapping the 3 animated `motion.circle` dots. Verified the dots' animation path (`cx: [70, 290, 290, 70, 70]`, `cy: [50, 50, 170, 170, 50]`, r=2.4 → bounding box 67.6/47.6 → 292.4/172.4) already stays 10px inside the laptop outline (60/40 → 300/180), so the clip is a no-op visually today but guarantees containment if the animation curve is tweaked later. (3) Added `className="h-full"` to the pillars' `<Reveal>` wrapper so the equal-heights chain is explicit: grid item (Reveal's motion.div, h-full → 100% of stretched row height) → TiltCard (h-full) → inner motion.div (h-full). Follows the pattern fixed in R1-d (MoreFeatures) for the same reason — without h-full on the grid item the inner `h-full` chain resolves to content height and cards in a row have unequal heights when pillar body text varies in length. Verified ParticleField + SlowMoChart both `absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none` behind content ✅, cross-out cloud line draws in on view via `motion.path` with `pathLength: 0→1` over 0.6s with 0.4s delay ✅, pillar TiltCards have `h-full` + `whileHover={{ y: -4 }}` lift ✅, scroll parallax `y: useTransform(scrollYProgress, [0,1], [40,-40])` on the diagram — ±40px drift on a 48px (mobile) / 64px (desktop) grid gap stays within the gutter, no overlap with the left column ✅.

- **Pricing.tsx** — verified prices are already $29 (Core) and $49 (Pro), NOT the old $149/$249 — `price: 29` (line 75), `price: 49` (line 81) ✅. (1) **Re-added the rotating conic-gradient ring around the Pro card, properly this time.** Previous implementation (removed per the inline comment "it read as a gimmicky rectangle spinning around the card") was a full rectangle. New implementation: ring container `absolute -inset-[1.5px] rounded-[9.5px] overflow-hidden pointer-events-none` (1.5px larger than the card on all sides, radius = 8px card radius + 1.5px = 9.5px), with a CSS donut mask (`WebkitMask`/`mask: linear-gradient(#000,#000) content-box, linear-gradient(#000,#000)` + `WebkitMaskComposite: xor` / `maskComposite: exclude` + `padding: 1.5px`) so only the outer 1.5px border strip is visible — the card's interior is fully unaffected and the ring never reads as a rectangle. Inside the ring, a `motion.div` at `absolute -inset-[50%]` (2× the ring size, centered) carries `conic-gradient(from 0deg, transparent 0%, rgb(var(--accent-base)) 12%, transparent 32%, transparent 100%)` and rotates 360° over 6s linear infinite — one soft accent arc sweeping clockwise around the card. The ring is the first child of the Pro card (behind badge + content in DOM order). (2) **Removed the static 1px boxShadow ring** (`0 0 0 1px rgb(var(--accent-base) / 0.5)`) from the Pro card's boxShadow — it was redundant with the new rotating ring and would have created a triple-border (rotating ring + 1px boxShadow ring + glass 1px border). Kept only the glow: `0 20px 60px -20px rgb(var(--accent-base) / 0.55)`. (3) Removed `border-tj-accent` class from the Pro card — the rotating ring is now the prominent border; the glass class's default `border: 1px solid rgb(var(--accent-base) / 0.30)` provides the subtle inner border. (4) Verified the "Most popular" badge at `-top-3.5` is NOT clipped: TiltCard has no overflow-hidden, the card itself has no overflow-hidden (only the ring container does, and the ring is a sibling layer), and the badge z-index was bumped from `z-10` → `z-20` so it sits above the ring's z-auto. Badge position (-14px above card top) overlaps with the ring's top edge (-1.5px to 0) — badge renders on top, breaking the ring's border at the top, which is the intended "badge affixed to the card" look. (5) Verified two cards equal heights: grid `md:grid-cols-2 gap-5 max-w-3xl mx-auto items-stretch` ✅, Reveal wrapper has `className="h-full"` ✅, TiltCard has `className="h-full"` ✅ (Pro), card motion.div has `h-full flex flex-col` ✅ (both Core and Pro). (6) SlowMoChart wrapper changed from `absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-44 pointer-events-none` → `absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none` so both MarketBackground and SlowMoChart are full-section ambient layers per spec. Content wrapper promoted to `relative z-10 max-w-page mx-auto px-5 md:px-8` so it sits explicitly above the background stack (MarketBackground + radial glow + SlowMoChart) — matches the convention fixed in R1-c. (7) CountUp price: added `min-w-[3ch] inline-block` to the className — the `$29`/`$49` price animates 0→29/0→49 over 1.6s, transitioning through 1-digit values (`$0`-`$9`, 2 chars) and 2-digit values (`$10`-`$29`, 3 chars); with `tnum` (tabular-nums) digit widths are uniform, but the digit COUNT change causes a sub-character right-edge shift mid-animation. `min-w-[3ch]` reserves 3 character widths up-front so the span is always 3ch wide, eliminating the shift. `inline-block` ensures `min-w` applies (the parent is `flex items-baseline` so the span is already a flex-item, but inline-block is belt-and-suspenders). (8) MagneticButton CTAs verified: x/y via `useSpring` on `useMotionValue` = pure transforms, no layout shift ✅. (9) Updated the inline comment to reflect the new state (rotating ring is back, properly masked). (10) Updated the `if (isPro)` return comment.

- Ran `bun run lint` → exit 0, no errors, no warnings. Ran `bun run build` → ✓ Compiled successfully in 9.3s, ✓ Generating static pages (7/7), all routes prerendered as static content, exit 0.

Stage Summary:
- 3 files modified (layout-only fixes + the requested rotating ring re-addition; no content/features removed; all keep `"use client"`):
  - `src/components/marketing/TrustStrip.tsx` — dot separators refactored from trailing-children-with-ml-6 inside each item to sibling flex items via `<Fragment>`, removing the 32px-vs-24px imbalance. Added `import { Fragment } from "react"`. MarketBackground behind, 5 pulsing-icon items, sweeping top accent line, mobile 2-per-row wrap all verified (no change needed).
  - `src/components/marketing/LocalFirst.tsx` — SlowMoChart wrapper → `absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none` (was `-inset-x-8 -inset-y-6`); added `#lf-laptop-clip` clipPath to SVG defs and applied to the data-flow dots group so the circulating dots can never escape the laptop outline; added `className="h-full"` to the pillars' `<Reveal>` wrapper for the equal-heights chain. ParticleField + SlowMoChart behind, cross-out cloud draw-in, TiltCard h-full + hover lift, scroll parallax no-overlap all verified (no change needed).
  - `src/components/marketing/Pricing.tsx` — re-added the rotating conic-gradient ring around the Pro card as a properly-masked 1.5px donut (was previously removed as a "gimmicky rectangle"); removed redundant static 1px boxShadow ring + `border-tj-accent` (replaced by the rotating ring); bumped badge z-10 → z-20 so it floats above the ring at `-top-3.5` without clipping; SlowMoChart wrapper → `absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none`; content wrapper → `relative z-10`; CountUp price gets `min-w-[3ch] inline-block` to prevent width shift during the 0→29/0→49 count-up; updated inline comments. Verified prices $29/$49, equal-height two-card grid, MarketBackground+SlowMoChart behind, MagneticButton no-shift — all already correct.
- Design system honored: `.glass`, `.rounded-card` (8px), `.pill`, `.divider-grad`, `.text-primary/.secondary/.tertiary`, `text-tj-accent`/`bg-tj-accent`, `text-pnl-pos`/`text-pnl-neg`, `.tnum`, `.max-w-page`, `overflow-hidden`. NO indigo/blue introduced — the conic-gradient uses `rgb(var(--accent-base))` which is slate (default :root) / gold / eserald / etc. depending on the active theme, all from the project's existing non-indigo palette. NO content/features removed.
- Lint clean (exit 0). Build clean (✓ Compiled successfully in 9.3s, all 7 routes prerendered as static content, exit 0).
- Next actions for follow-up: (a) The conic-gradient ring's donut mask uses `WebkitMaskComposite: xor` + `maskComposite: exclude` — Safari < 15.4 doesn't support `mask-composite` and falls back to the un-composited mask (the second `linear-gradient` wins, making the entire ring visible, i.e., a filled rotating rectangle behind/around the card). If Safari < 15.4 support is required, add a `@supports not (mask-composite: exclude) { ... }` fallback that hides the ring or uses a static border instead. Modern Safari (15.4+) and all evergreen Chrome/Firefox handle it correctly. (b) The TrustStrip dots are now centered between items (24px on each side via `gap-x-6`) but the parent `gap-x-6` also applies on mobile where dots are hidden — items get 24px horizontal gaps on mobile, which is generous but functional. If tighter mobile spacing is desired, switch to `gap-x-4 md:gap-x-6` so mobile uses 16px gaps (denser 2-per-row layout) and md+ keeps 24px. Left as-is to minimize change. (c) The LocalFirst SVG crossed-out cloud at `x=276-300, y=56-72` overlaps with the laptop body's top-right corner (`x=60-300, y=40-180`) — this is the original design intent (cloud hovering near the laptop, being crossed out), not a regression, but if a "cloud fully outside the laptop" reading is preferred, shift the cloud path right by ~30px so it sits in the `x=300-340` gutter. Out of scope for this layout-fix pass.

Task ID: R2-a
Agent: qa-demo-dashboard
Task: Pixel-perfect review and fix of DashboardPage

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md for prior context (Task 5-a built DashboardPage from scratch; design tokens in globals.css: .glass, .hairline, .pill, .rounded-card, .tnum; parent container is `h-[640px] overflow-y-auto custom-scroll` in AppDemo.tsx).
- Re-read full DashboardPage.tsx (886 lines) + all imported primitives (MarketBackground, SlowMoChart, MarketClock, MiniCalendar, EquityCurve, Money, CountUp, Reveal, Eyebrow) to understand structure, props, and existing layout conventions before touching anything.
- Verified baseline: `bun run lint` clean, `bun run build` succeeds.
- Identified 5 concrete pixel-perfect issues and applied targeted fixes via MultiEdit (no content removed, no features changed):

  1. **Capture composer — drop zone / note textarea vertical misalignment**: The drop-screens `<button>` had no label while the note had a label above it, so the two columns didn't bottom-align (note column was ~16px taller). Wrapped both columns in `<div className="min-w-0 flex flex-col">` with a matching `labelCls` label ("Capturas"/"Screenshots" bilingual inline) above the drop button. Added `w-full` to the drop button so it fills its grid column. Added `flex-1` to the textarea so it stretches to match the drop button's height on md+. Also removed a conflicting `border-solid` from the drop zone (it had both `border-dashed` and `border-solid`, leaving the dashed style to chance based on Tailwind's source order — now it's unambiguously `border border-dashed hairline`).

  2. **Capture composer — risk-$ readout column width**: Added `min-w-0 md:min-w-[160px]` to the risk-$ readout column. Previously the column had no explicit min-width, so a long Money value (e.g. $10,000.00 at text-4xl) could push the layout wider than the composer or cause the direction toggle column to compress awkwardly. `min-w-0` allows the flex item to shrink below its content size (prevents overflow push), and `md:min-w-[160px]` guarantees enough room for the pulsing-dot label, the value, and the calc-method pill beneath.

  3. **Results strip — value size consistency + tnum**: The "Today's session" KPI used `text-sm` for its value while the other 4 KPIs used `text-base`, so the baseline-aligned strip had visually inconsistent value sizes. Bumped sessionCount motion.div to `text-base` and added `tnum` so the embedded session count digit uses tabular figures like all the other numeric KPIs (Money/CountUp already apply `tnum` internally).

  4. **Performance block — KPI tile consistent heights**: Added `h-full` to the KpiTile motion.div so all tiles in the same grid row stretch to equal heights (previously a tile with a wrapping or slightly taller value could be taller than its row partner). Also added `min-w-0` to the value container div so long Money/CountUp values can shrink/truncate gracefully rather than overflowing the tile.

  5. **P&L calendar — MiniCalendar oversize + z-10 stacking**: The MiniCalendar's `aspect-square` cells were rendering at ~100px each inside the full-width glass card (~760px wide), making the calendar look stretched and the day-number text (`text-[10px]`) look lost in vast empty cells. Constrained the calendar with `className="max-w-md mx-auto"` so cells are a reasonable ~58px each and the calendar is visually centered in the card. Also added `relative overflow-hidden` to the motion.div wrapper and wrapped the inner content in `<div className="relative z-10">` for consistent stacking context (matches the pattern used by the composer and performance chart card, even though this card has no background chart — future-proofs it and keeps the layering convention uniform).

- Verified no horizontal overflow: composer card (`overflow-hidden`), performance chart card (`overflow-hidden`), P&L calendar card (now `overflow-hidden`), MarketClock compact strip (internal `overflow-x-auto custom-scroll`), all grids and flex-wrap rows behave correctly.
- Confirmed backgrounds are correctly positioned: MarketBackground (opacity 0.06) behind composer via `absolute inset-0` (component adds `pointer-events-none` internally); SlowMoChart (opacity 0.10) behind performance chart card via `absolute inset-0 w-full h-full` (also `pointer-events-none` internally). All foreground content sits in `relative z-10` containers above the backgrounds.
- Confirmed `"use client"` directive preserved, no indigo/blue colors introduced (only `tj-accent`, `pnl-pos/neg/warn`, `white/5-8`, `text-primary/secondary/tertiary`).
- Ran `cd /home/z/my-project && bun run lint 2>&1 | tail -15` → clean (zero errors, zero warnings).
- Ran `cd /home/z/my-project && bun run build 2>&1 | tail -10` → succeeds, all 7 static pages generated.

Stage Summary:
- DashboardPage.tsx patched in place: 5 surgical layout fixes, zero content/features removed, zero new dependencies, zero i18n changes.
- Capture composer: drop zone and note textarea now have matching label+content structure with equal heights; risk-$ readout has a proper min-width floor; dashed border on drop zone is unambiguous.
- Results strip: all 5 KPI values now use `text-base` with `tnum` for visual consistency.
- Performance block: KPI tiles stretch to equal row heights via `h-full`; long values can shrink without overflow via `min-w-0`.
- P&L calendar: MiniCalendar constrained to `max-w-md mx-auto` so cells are reasonably sized inside the glass card; card now follows the same `relative overflow-hidden` + `relative z-10` inner wrapper convention as the other cards.
- Lint clean, build succeeds. Ready for visual QA in the browser.

Task ID: R2-d
Agent: qa-demo-journal-playbook-settings
Task: Pixel-perfect review and fix of JournalPage, PlaybookPage, SettingsPage

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md (1353 lines, prior QA rounds R1-a..R1-g + R4 marketing QA), the 3 target files in full (JournalPage 980L, PlaybookPage 858L, SettingsPage 796L), plus supporting primitives: SlowMoChart.tsx (wrapper div bakes `pointer-events-none` + `style={{width,height:'100%'}}` — so passing `absolute inset-0 w-full h-full` results in a true full-cover ambient layer), TiltCard.tsx (forwardRef via motion.div with rotateX/rotateY springs + inset-0 rounded-[inherit] mix-blend-overlay glare; NO overflow-hidden — tilts don't clip the inner card), Reveal.tsx (motion.div with `whileInView` + `viewport={{ once, margin:'-60px' }}`, accepts className passthrough), PremiumCard.tsx (`glass rounded-card ${className}`), dialog.tsx (Radix DialogTrigger uses `asChild` Slot — clones child & merges onClick/ref/aria-haspopup/data-state), and globals.css tokens (.glass/.hairline/.divider-grad/.eyebrow/.pill/.text-primary/.secondary/.tertiary/.tnum/.rounded-card/.max-w-page/.custom-scroll; --accent-base + pnl-pos/neg/warn + sig-green/amber/red). Confirmed React 19 (`react@^19.0.0`) + Next 16 + framer-motion 12 — ref-as-prop is valid for function components, so `ComponentProps<typeof motion.button>` includes `ref`.

- **JournalPage.tsx** — pixel review:
  - Ritual card 2-col grid (`grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 md:gap-8`) verified ✅. Pre-market column uses accent (gold) for checklist checkmarks + day-score dots + dot indicator; Post-market uses pnl-pos (green). Animated SVG checkmark via `motion.path` with `pathLength: 0→1` on toggle ✅. Day-score dots `role="radiogroup"` with `n <= value` active fill + layoutId ring on selected ✅. Textarea `rows={3} resize-none custom-scroll w-full` ✅.
  - **BUG FIXED — Mobile divider position**: The horizontal mobile divider (`md:hidden col-span-full -my-1`) was the 3rd DOM child in the grid container, AFTER both RitualColumns. On mobile (1-col grid) that placed it BELOW the post-market column instead of between the two columns. Reordered DOM so the mobile divider sits BETWEEN the pre and post RitualColumns. The absolute vertical desktop divider (hidden md:block) is now moved to AFTER the post column too (its absolute positioning makes DOM order irrelevant, but cleaner to keep dividers grouped). Added `aria-hidden="true"` to the mobile divider for consistency with the desktop one.
  - Discipline report HERO verified: PremiumCard has `relative overflow-hidden`, SlowMoChart is `absolute inset-0 w-full h-full` opacity 0.06 (pointer-events-none baked into SlowMoChart wrapper) ✅. ComplianceRing `w-40 h-40 md:w-44 md:h-44` SVG with animated `motion.circle` `strokeDashoffset: C → C*(1-pct)` over 1.6s ✅. Cost of indiscipline `text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tnum text-pnl-neg` with CountUp duration 2.4s ✅. DivergingBar — center 1px line, motion.div width 0→inPct% (right of center) + 0→outPct% (left of center), staggered delays 0.4s/0.55s ✅. TrafficLight — 3 dots, active dot opacity 1 scale 1, inactive opacity 0.2 scale 0.7, active has ping ring (opacity 0.55→0, scale 1→2.6, repeat Infinity) ✅. ExpInPlan/ExpOutPlan cards use pnl-pos/pnl-neg tints with Money signs.
  - Review tabs verified: tablist uses 2 buttons, active state has `motion.span layoutId="review-tab-pill"` with spring transition — slides between tabs ✅. Bar chart container `<AnimatePresence mode="wait"><motion.div key={tab}>` — full subtree remounts on tab switch, so `PnlBarChart` re-mounts and its `initial→animate` (`height: 0 → pct/2%`) replays ✅. Bars are diverging from center 1px line (`bottom-1/2` for pos, `top-1/2` for neg), hover shows tooltip + widens bar from w-2/3 → w-4/5 ✅. Legend below ✅.
  - History timeline verified: `motion.li` with `initial={{opacity:0, x:-10}}` + `delay: 0.06*i` stagger ✅. Left border colored by P&L tone (`border-l-2 border-l-pnl-pos/neg/warn`) ✅. `whileHover={{ y: -2 }}` lift + `hover:shadow-[...]` ✅. Date pill (month + day) with tnum, P&L Money with colorizeSign, compliance Chip ✅.
  - `tnum` verified on every numeric display: compliance %, cost-of-indiscipline $, expectancy cards, bar chart tooltips, history date/count/score/P&L ✅.

- **PlaybookPage.tsx** — pixel review:
  - Header section `relative mb-6 overflow-hidden rounded-card` with SlowMoChart `absolute inset-0 h-full w-full` opacity 0.06 ✅. Content in `relative flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-end md:justify-between gap-4 py-2` ✅.
  - **BUG FIXED — MagneticTrigger dropped Radix Slot props**: The original MagneticTrigger only destructured `{children, className, strength}` and forwarded NOTHING else to its inner motion.button. When used as `<DialogTrigger asChild>{<MagneticTrigger .../>}</DialogTrigger>`, Radix Slot clones the child and passes `onClick` (the handler that opens the dialog), `ref`, `aria-haspopup`, `data-state`, etc. — all of which were silently dropped. Net effect: clicking the magnetic "New setup" button in the header did NOT open the dialog. Fixed by widening the props type to `ComponentProps<typeof motion.button> & { strength?: number }`, extracting `onMouseMove`/`onMouseLeave` (so they merge with the magnetic effect handlers — caller-supplied handlers fire first via `onMouseMove?.(e)`), and spreading `{...rest}` (which now includes `onClick`, `ref`, `aria-*`, `data-*`, `disabled`, etc.) onto motion.button. Verified the 6th-cell CTA card uses a plain `<button>` so it was already correct — only the header magnetic trigger was broken.
  - Summary band: `grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-6`. SummaryStat has full h-full chain: `Reveal className="h-full"` → `motion.div className="h-full"` → `div className="glass rounded-card p-4 h-full flex flex-col gap-1.5"`. With default `items-stretch`, all 3 cards equal height ✅.
  - Setup cards grid: `grid sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4` ✅. SetupCard chain: `Reveal className="h-full"` → `motion.div className="h-full" whileHover={{y:-4}}` → `TiltCard className="h-full" max={7} glare={0.16}` → `article className="glass rounded-card p-5 h-full flex flex-col gap-4 relative overflow-hidden"`. TiltCard has NO overflow-hidden (verified), so the article's own `overflow-hidden` clips the accent top-edge tint correctly while letting the TiltCard's glare overlay sit at inset-0 rounded-[inherit] ✅. 6th-cell CTA Reveal(h-full) → motion.div(h-full) → button(`w-full h-full min-h-[260px]`) — equal-height in the same row ✅.
  - Sparkline verified: `motion.path` with `pathLength: 0→1` over 1.1s ease [0.22,1,0.36,1] + `opacity: 0→1` over 0.25s. `key={replayKey}` (incremented on `onHoverStart`) remounts → re-draws on hover ✅. SVG uses `preserveAspectRatio="none"` + `vectorEffect="non-scaling-stroke"` so the line stays crisp at any size ✅.
  - Win/loss bar: `flex h-1.5 rounded-full overflow-hidden bg-white/5` with two motion.div widths animating 0→winPct%/lossPct% staggered (0.35+0.06*i / 0.5+0.06*i) ✅. Empty state shows `bg-white/10 w-full` ✅.
  - Rules checklist: static Check icon (lucide) inside a 3.5×3.5 box tinted with the setup hue, label uses uppercase tracking-[0.1em] ✅. Each setup has a distinct hue (16 185 129 / 245 158 11 / 244 63 94 / var(--accent-base) / 20 184 166) — NO indigo/blue ✅.
  - `tnum` verified on: sample counts, expectancy/winRate/pnlTotal Money+CountUp values, win/loss counts ✅.

- **SettingsPage.tsx** — pixel review:
  - **FIXED — Header background convention**: Original wrapped SlowMoChart in a separate `<div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-40 overflow-hidden -z-10">` placed as a sibling BEFORE the `<Reveal>` header — this created a fixed 160px strip at the top of the page that didn't actually align with the header content below it (header grows with text length, the strip doesn't), and used `-z-10` which is non-standard for the spec's `absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none` pattern. Restructured to match the PlaybookPage header convention: the `<header>` element itself is now `relative mb-7 md:mb-9 overflow-hidden rounded-card`, SlowMoChart is a direct child with `absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none w-full h-full` opacity 0.06 cycle 18, and the header content (Eyebrow + h1 + p) is wrapped in a `relative py-2` div so it stacks above the chart (positioned siblings paint in source order — content is later, paints on top). The `overflow-hidden rounded-card` on the header clips the chart exactly to the header bounds — chart now visibly tracks the header's true height (taller on mobile when the description wraps). Removed the standalone `-z-10` strip entirely.
  - Language section: 2 toggle buttons in `grid grid-cols-2 gap-3`, each `h-[68px] rounded-card overflow-hidden`. Active state has `motion.span layoutId="lang-pill"` with spring (stiffness 380, damping 32) that slides between the two buttons ✅. Active button text uses `text-primary-foreground` + inline `color: rgb(var(--accent-foreground))` for guaranteed contrast on the accent pill. Inactive has hover wash `bg-tj-accent/0 → hover:bg-tj-accent/[0.06]` ✅.
  - Appearance section: theme toggle (light/dark) `grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-4` with `layoutId="theme-pill"` spring ✅. Live preview card has TWO keyed overlays: `shimmer-${theme}` (110deg accent gradient sweep, x:-100%→100%, opacity 0.85→0, 0.95s) replays on theme change; `flash-${palette}` (radial accent gradient, opacity 0.55→0, 0.7s) replays on palette change. P&L number `text-3xl md:text-[2.5rem] tnum text-pnl-pos` re-animates via `key={`pnl-${theme}-${palette}`}` + initial opacity 0.5 y:4 → animate opacity 1 y:0. MiniSparkline uses `rgb(var(--accent-base))` so it recolors instantly on palette switch ✅. KPI strip (3 cols, winRate/expectancy/profitFactor) at bottom with tnum ✅.
  - Accent color section: `grid grid-cols-3 sm:grid-cols-5 gap-4 md:gap-5`. Each swatch is a `motion.button` with staggered entrance (`initial={{opacity:0,y:12,scale:0.92}} animate={{opacity:1,y:0,scale:1}} delay:0.2+i*0.06`) ✅. Active swatch has `motion.span layoutId="palette-active-ring"` boxShadow `0 0 0 2px accent, 0 0 24px accent/0.35` that slides between swatches ✅. Hover glow: `motion.span` blur-xl with `background: p.dark`, opacity 0→0.55 on hover/active ✅. Swatch is `w-14 h-14 rounded-full overflow-hidden` with `linear-gradient(135deg, dark→light)` + inner highlight boxShadow + AnimatePresence check icon (spring scale 0→1) ✅.
  - Sample data section: glass card with description + `motion.button` (`min-w-[200px] h-11`) using `AnimatePresence mode="wait" initial={false}` to cross-fade between idle/loading/loaded states. Idle: refresh icon + label. Loading: spinning ring (`border-2 border-tj-accent/30 border-t-tj-accent` rotate 360 linear infinite 0.9s) + "Loading…" text. Loaded: check icon + "✓ Loaded" in pnl-pos text. Button disabled when not idle; `whileHover`/`whileTap` scale only when idle ✅. Cross-fade uses y:±10 + opacity 0→1, 0.2s — no layout shift (button has fixed `h-11 min-w-[200px]` and content is absolutely positioned `inset-0 flex items-center justify-center`) ✅.
  - About section: 4-col grid (`grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3`) of build info cards with tnum values (Version 2.4.1, Build 2024.11.07, Platform, Languages) ✅. Made-with line + 3 social motion.a icons (GitHub, X, Website) with `whileHover={{y:-2, scale:1.05}} whileTap={{scale:0.95}}` ✅. Footer with copyright + "Personal license" pill + pulsing activation dot ✅.
  - `tnum` verified on: language code labels, palette preview P&L, KPI strip, build info, copyright, license ✅. NO indigo/blue anywhere — all colors use accent-base, pnl-pos/neg/warn, sig-green/amber/red, white tints ✅.

- Verified NO content/features were removed in any of the 3 files — only layout fixes (JournalPage: divider DOM reorder; PlaybookPage: MagneticTrigger prop forwarding; SettingsPage: background restructure). All three files retain `"use client"`. ES/EN bilingual preserved everywhere.

- Ran `bun run lint` → exit 0, no errors, no warnings. Ran `bun run build` → ✓ Compiled successfully in 18.8s, ✓ Generating static pages (7/7) in 289.6ms, all routes prerendered as static content.

Stage Summary:
- 3 files modified (layout-only fixes, no content/features removed, all keep `"use client"`):
  - `src/components/demo/pages/JournalPage.tsx` — Reordered DOM so the mobile horizontal divider sits BETWEEN the pre-market and post-market RitualColumns (was previously the 3rd grid item, rendering BELOW both columns on mobile). Added `aria-hidden="true"` to the mobile divider for consistency with the desktop one. All other layout pieces (2-col grid + stack-on-mobile, animated SVG checkmarks, day-score dots with layoutId ring, textarea sizing, ComplianceRing SVG with animated stroke, cost-of-indiscipline CountUp, diverging bar, pulsing traffic light, sliding tab pill via layoutId, bar chart re-animate on tab switch via `key={tab}` + AnimatePresence mode="wait", staggered history timeline with P&L-colored left border + hover lift, SlowMoChart absolute inset-0 behind discipline report) all verified correct.
  - `src/components/demo/pages/PlaybookPage.tsx` — Fixed MagneticTrigger to forward all native motion.button props (via `ComponentProps<typeof motion.button> & { strength?: number }` + `{...rest}` spread) so Radix `DialogTrigger asChild` Slot's `onClick` (the handler that opens the dialog), `ref`, `aria-haspopup`, `data-state` etc. propagate to the inner motion.button. Previously these props were silently dropped because MagneticTrigger only destructured `{children, className, strength}` — clicking the magnetic "New setup" button in the header did NOT open the dialog. Also merged caller-supplied `onMouseMove`/`onMouseLeave` with the magnetic effect handlers (caller handlers fire first via `?.()`). Added `ComponentProps` and `MouseEvent as ReactMouseEvent` to the React import list. All other layout pieces (SlowMoChart behind header, equal-height summary band via h-full chain, 3-col setup grid with h-full chain through Reveal→motion.div→TiltCard→article, TiltCard 3D + glare, sparkline draw-in + replayKey on hover, animated win/loss bars, hue-tinted rules checklist, 6th-cell CTA min-h-[260px]) all verified correct.
  - `src/components/demo/pages/SettingsPage.tsx` — Restructured the SlowMoChart backdrop from a standalone `pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-40 overflow-hidden -z-10` strip (which didn't align with the actual header height and used non-standard `-z-10`) to the spec convention: the `<header>` itself is now `relative mb-7 md:mb-9 overflow-hidden rounded-card`, with SlowMoChart as a direct child at `absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none w-full h-full` opacity 0.06 cycle 18, and the header content (Eyebrow + h1 + p) wrapped in a `relative py-2` div that stacks above the chart. The chart now visibly tracks the header's true height (taller on mobile when the description wraps). All other layout pieces (2 language toggle buttons with layoutId pill, theme toggle with layoutId pill, live preview card with keyed shimmer + palette flash overlays + accent-recoloring MiniSparkline + KPI strip, 5 palette swatches with staggered entrance + layoutId active ring + blur-xl hover glow + AnimatePresence check icon, sample-data load button with cross-fade idle/loading/loaded states and fixed-height containment, 4-col about info grid + 3 social links with hover lift + license/copyright footer) all verified correct.
- Design system honored: `.glass`, `.rounded-card`, `.hairline`, `.divider-grad`, `.eyebrow`, `.pill`, `.text-primary/.secondary/.tertiary`, `text-tj-accent`/`bg-tj-accent`, `text-pnl-neg/.pos/.warn`, `.tnum`, `.custom-scroll`. NO indigo/blue introduced. NO content removed. All three files retain `"use client"`.
- Lint clean (exit 0). Build clean (✓ Compiled successfully in 18.8s, all 7 routes prerendered as static content).

Task ID: R2-c
Agent: qa-demo-analytics
Task: Pixel-perfect review and fix of AnalyticsPage

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md, AnalyticsPage.tsx (1079 lines), and all dependencies (Chip, CountUp, Reveal, Money, Eyebrow, SlowMoChart, Histogram, Heatmap, DemoContext, AppDemo, globals.css, data.ts, i18n.tsx) to understand the design system, tokens, and rendering context (h-[640px] overflow-y-auto custom-scroll, basePath /JournalTradingWeb).
- Ran baseline `bun run lint` and `bun run build` — both clean.
- Audited every section listed in the task spec (sticky filter bar, KPI grid, ratios row, winners/losers donut, R-over-time, distributions, weekday/month bars, heatmap, rankings) for layout correctness, equal heights, tnum on numbers, re-animation on filter change, horizontal overflow, and content-above-backgrounds.
- Identified and fixed 6 issues:

  1. **Sticky filter bar backdrop bleed** — The outer sticky container used negative margins to span the full scroll width but had no background, so scrolling content showed through the padding area around the inner glass card. Added `backdrop-blur-md bg-[rgb(var(--int)/0.75)] border-b hairline border-solid` to the outer container so content is frosted/dimmed behind the bar and a subtle hairline separates it from the page content below.

  2. **Setup select missing tnum** — The instrument select had `tnum` but the setup select did not, causing non-tabular figure width jitter when cycling setups. Added `tnum` to the setup select className for consistency.

  3. **KPI grid unequal tile heights** — KpiTile motion.div had no `h-full`, and the grid used default `auto-rows-auto`, so the two rows of 4 tiles could have different heights if any value wrapped. Added `h-full` to KpiTile and `auto-rows-fr` to the grid so all 8 tiles are uniform.

  4. **Ratios row unequal tile heights** — Same issue: ratio tiles had no `h-full` and grid used `auto-rows-auto`. Added `h-full` to each tile and `auto-rows-fr` to the grid for uniform heights across all breakpoints (2/3/6 cols).

  5. **WinnersDonut not re-animating on filter change** — The donut arc (`motion.circle` with `whileInView once`) and center `CountUp` never remounted when filters changed, so they stayed at their initial values visually. Added a `reKey` prop to WinnersDonut, used as `key` on both the `motion.circle` and `CountUp`, and passed `reKey={filterSig}` from the page so the donut redraws and re-counts on every filter change.

  6. **Verified no other issues** — Donut center text is centered (flex items-center justify-center), legend aligned (flex gap-4). R-over-time bars colored by sign (pnl-pos/pnl-neg), animate via scaleY from baseline. Distributions use Histogram with pos-neg/accent colorize, equal heights via SectionCard h-full + Reveal stretch. Weekday/month bars animate width/height correctly. Heatmap renders inside glass card with correct sizing. Rankings 2-col grid uses h-full on Reveal + inner glass; bar widths proportional via maxAbs. All derived data (filteredTrades, metrics, histograms, rankings, sparklines) in useMemo. No indigo/blue. No set-state-in-effect in the page. No horizontal overflow (flex-wrap on filter row, overflow-x-auto on wide SVG charts).

- Ran `bun run lint` (clean) and `bun run build` (clean, 7/7 static pages) after all edits.

Stage Summary:
- AnalyticsPage.tsx now has: a properly frosted sticky filter bar with hairline separator; tabular figures on both filter selects; uniform-height KPI tiles (4x2 grid with auto-rows-fr + h-full); uniform-height ratio tiles (6-col with auto-rows-fr + h-full); a WinnersDonut that re-animates arc draw and win-rate count on every filter change.
- All existing features preserved — no content removed, no behavior changed beyond the layout/animation fixes.
- Lint and build both pass.

Task: Pixel-perfect review and fix of TradesPage and TradeDetailPage

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md (1353 lines, full project context incl. foundation, marketing QA rounds R1-a..R1-h, demo page builds in round 5). Read both target files in full (TradesPage.tsx 609 lines, TradeDetailPage.tsx 784 lines). Cross-referenced supporting primitives: Chip.tsx (pill variants: default/pos/neg/warn/accent/neutral), Money.tsx (tnum + pnlTone coloring), CountUp.tsx (tnum + IntersectionObserver triggered easeOutExpo), SlowMoChart.tsx (SVG preserveAspectRatio="none", useInView-guarded, pointer-events-none), MagneticButton.tsx (x/y motion-values via useSpring → pure transforms, no layout shift), Eyebrow.tsx, Reveal.tsx (motion.div transform-only). Verified globals.css tokens: `.glass` (rgb(var(--card)) + 1px accent border + ::before gradient border), `.chrome` (rgb(var(--chrome)) + backdrop-blur), `.hairline`, `.pill`, `.tnum` (tabular-nums), `.rounded-card` (8px), text-pnl-pos/neg/warn, bg-tj-accent, text-tj-accent. Confirmed NO indigo/blue in palette (--accent-base is slate/gold/esmeralda/ónix/aurora/seda depending on theme). Confirmed demo renders inside `h-[640px] overflow-y-auto custom-scroll` (AppDemo.tsx line 78). Confirmed basePath `/JournalTradingWeb` handled by `asset()` helper (not directly relevant to these two files).
- Verified DemoContext.tsx: `useDemo()` provides `filters`, `setFilters`, `clearFilters`, `goDetail(tradeId)`, `goBack`, `selectedTradeId`. TradesPage reads filters/setFilters/clearFilters/goDetail; TradeDetailPage reads selectedTradeId/goBack.

TradesPage.tsx audit + fixes:
- Header: search input (`relative w-full md:w-80` with absolute SVG icon, `h-9`, focus:border-tj-accent/50) + filter chips in `flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-end md:justify-between gap-4` — aligned, wraps gracefully. Filter chips use shared-layout `layoutId={`trade-filter-${group}`}` animated pill (spring 380/30) for active state ✓. SlowMoChart behind header in `absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none` inside `relative overflow-hidden rounded-card` container ✓.
- FIX 1 (filter separators on mobile): the two vertical group separators (`<span className="w-px h-4 bg-white/10 mx-1" />`) are direct children of the outer `flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2` row. On narrow viewports the row wraps, and because the separators are standalone flex items (not grouped with their following chip group), they can land at the start of a wrapped line — reading as an orphaned leading bar before "DIRECTION" / "COMPLIANCE" labels. Added `hidden md:inline-block` to both separators so they only appear on desktop (where the row fits on one line); on mobile the uppercase labels provide enough visual grouping. Also added `flex-wrap` to the Direction and Compliance group wrappers (Instrument group already had it) so all three groups wrap consistently if any single group is too wide for the line.
- KPI strip: `grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3` — 4 equal-width cells on desktop, 2×2 on mobile ✓. KpiCard uses consistent `px-4 py-3`, `text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.15em]` label + `font-semibold text-xl mt-1` value. Values left-aligned within equal-width cards → aligned x-positions ✓. CountUp renders `<span className="tnum ...">` so tabular figures ✓. No fix needed.
- Table: sticky header `sticky top-0 chrome z-10` ✓ (spec-correct class). 10 columns all `px-3 py-2.5 whitespace-nowrap` → consistent padding, no wrap ✓. Zebra striping `even:bg-white/[0.02]` ✓. Footer totals row `chrome border-t hairline border-solid` with `colSpan={6}` label + right-aligned P&L (Money) + right-aligned R (tnum) ✓. Horizontal scroll via `<div className="overflow-x-auto custom-scroll">` wrapping the table ✓.
  - Note: per CSS spec, `overflow-x:auto` on the wrapper creates a scroll container (the `overflow-y:visible` is computed to `auto` per the overflow-3 quirk), which becomes the `position:sticky` containing block for the thead. Since the wrapper has no fixed height (= content height, no vertical overflow), the thead's `top:0` sticky has no vertical scroll range to stick against, and it scrolls with the page. This is a known CSS limitation of the `overflow-x-auto wrapper + sticky thead` pattern. Left as-is because the spec explicitly requires `sticky top-0 chrome z-10` (present) and the only real fixes (separate header/body tables with fixed col widths, JS sticky, or removing the h-scroll wrapper) would either break column alignment or remove horizontal scrolling — both out of scope for a layout-fix pass.
- FIX 2 (row hover transition): TradeRow had `transition-colors` which only animates `background-color` (and border-color/color/fill/stroke) — the `hover:shadow-[inset_2px_0_0_0_rgb(var(--accent-base))]` left accent bar snapped in instantly. Changed to `transition-[background-color,box-shadow] duration-150` so both the bg tint and the inset accent bar animate smoothly together.
- Rows: staggered entrance via `transition={{ delay: Math.min(index * 0.025, 0.4), duration: 0.35, ease: [0.22,1,0.36,1] }}` ✓. Uses transform `y:8→0` + opacity — no layout shift ✓. `AnimatePresence mode="popLayout"` + `layout` on motion.tr for filter changes ✓. `cursor-pointer` + `onClick={() => goDetail(trade.id)}` ✓.
- Empty state: `<td colSpan={10} className="py-16 text-center">` with centered flex-col (icon + message + clear button) ✓. Only renders when `filtered.length === 0`; footer totals row only renders when `filtered.length > 0` — no conflict ✓.
- Load more button: `<div className="border-t hairline border-solid p-3 flex justify-center">` inside the glass card, after the scroll wrapper, before the card close — correct position ✓. Shows remaining count ✓.
- Backgrounds: SlowMoChart in `absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none` inside `relative overflow-hidden rounded-card` header container ✓.

TradeDetailPage.tsx audit + fixes:
- Hero band: `motion.section` with `relative overflow-hidden glass rounded-card p-5 md:p-6` ✓. SlowMoChart in `absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none opacity-[0.06]` ✓. Back button = MagneticButton (strength 0.22, chrome border, hover:text-primary) ✓. Meta row (id · session · datetime) right-aligned with `tnum` on numeric/date spans ✓. Chips row `flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 mb-3` (instrument accent + direction pos/neg + setup neutral + compliance pos/neg/warn) — wraps gracefully ✓. Big P&L (CountUp, `text-5xl md:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight`, tone-colored) + R-multiple (`text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold tnum`, pnl-pos/neg) in `flex flex-wrap items-baseline gap-x-4 gap-y-1` — baseline-aligned ✓. Trade journey SVG: `relative w-full h-24 md:h-28` container with `viewBox="0 0 100 30" preserveAspectRatio="none"` SVG + 4 HTML marker spans positioned via `left:top` percentages matching the path's viewBox coords → markers align with path points even under non-uniform stretch ✓. Markers animate in with staggered spring (delay 1.4/1.65/1.85/2.05s) ✓. Legend `flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-3 md:gap-5 mt-3` ✓.
- Execution + Plan grid: `grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-5 mb-5` — 2-col desktop, stack mobile ✓. Both cards `glass rounded-card p-5 md:p-6` with `whileHover={{ y: -2 }}` (transform-only, no layout shift) + accent glow shadow ✓. `<dl className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-y-3.5 gap-x-4">` — consistent spacing ✓. All numeric values have `tnum` ✓.
- FIX 3 (RR bar — contiguous bars during animation): the original used two absolutely-positioned bars inside a relative track. The risk bar animated `width: 0→riskFraction%` from `left:0`. The reward bar had a STATIC `style={{ left: riskFraction% }}` and animated `width: 0→rewardFraction%`. Because the reward bar's left edge was pinned to the risk bar's FINAL position (not its current animated position), a visible gap opened between the risk bar's growing right edge and the reward bar's fixed left edge during the 0.7s–1.6s overlap window. Refactored to a flex layout: track is now `flex`, risk bar is `h-full bg-pnl-neg/80 shrink-0` (width animated), reward bar is `h-full bg-pnl-pos/80 shrink-0` (width animated). Flex lays them out contiguously, so the reward bar's left edge always tracks the risk bar's current right edge — no gap at any animation frame. `riskFraction + rewardFraction = 1` so the bars exactly fill the track at rest. Removed the now-unused inline `style={{ left }}` and `absolute inset-y-0 left-0` classes.
- FIX 4 (Plan card height balance): the Execution card has 9 dl items (5 grid rows); the Plan card has 4 dl items (2 grid rows) + RR bar. With grid `items-stretch` (default), both cards stretch to the taller one's height, leaving the Plan card with empty space at the bottom. Added `flex flex-col` to the Plan card's motion.div and changed the RR bar wrapper from `mt-6` to `mt-auto pt-6` so the RR bar is pushed to the bottom of the card, absorbing the extra height. The `pt-6` preserves the 24px breathing room above the bar.
- FIX 5 (Review card height balance): the Context card (3 blockquotes + screenshots drop zone + 2 thumbnail tiles) is taller than the Review card (toggle + summary + save button). With grid stretch, the Review card had empty space below the save button. Added `flex flex-col` to the Review card's motion.div and changed the save button from `mt-5` to `mt-auto pt-5` so the save button is pushed to the bottom of the card. The `pt-5` preserves the 20px gap above the button.
- FIX 6 (Execution + Context cards — flex-col for consistency): added `flex flex-col` to the Execution and Context card motion.divs as well. Execution's dl is the only child after the eyebrow (no bottom-pinned element needed); Context's screenshots section is the last child and naturally sits at the bottom. Adding `flex flex-col` makes all four cards in the two grids use the same layout model (defensive consistency; no visual regression because adjacent-sibling margin-collapse doesn't apply here — each child has only one vertical margin).
- Context + Review grid: `grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-5` ✓. Blockquotes: `border-l-2 border-solid border-tj-accent/40 pl-3 py-0.5 text-sm text-secondary italic leading-relaxed` ✓. Screenshots drop zone: `border-2 border-dashed border-white/10 rounded-md p-4 text-center` with hover accent ✓. Thumbnails: `grid grid-cols-2 gap-2` with `aspect-[4/3]` chrome-bordered tiles containing deterministic MiniCandles SVG ✓. Review toggle: `grid grid-cols-3 gap-2` with shared-layout `layoutId="review-pill"` (spring 400/30) animated selection ✓. Summary section: `border-t hairline border-solid pt-4` with 4 SummaryRow (tnum values, tone-colored) ✓. Save button: `w-full h-11 rounded-md bg-tj-accent text-primary-foreground` with `whileHover scale 1.02` / `whileTap scale 0.98` ✓.
- Backgrounds: SlowMoChart behind hero in `absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none opacity-[0.06]` inside `relative overflow-hidden glass rounded-card` section ✓.

Verification:
- Ran `bun run lint` → exit 0, no errors, no warnings.
- Ran `bun run build` → ✓ Compiled successfully in 9.1s, ✓ Generating static pages (7/7), all routes prerendered as static content, exit 0.
- No content/features removed. `"use client"` preserved on both files. NO indigo/blue introduced. `tnum` already present on all numeric values (verified, no additions needed).

Stage Summary:
- TradesPage.tsx: 3 fixes (all layout-only):
  1. Filter group separators: `hidden md:inline-block` on both vertical separators so they don't orphan at the start of wrapped lines on mobile; also added `flex-wrap` to Direction + Compliance group wrappers for consistent wrapping with the Instrument group.
  2. Row hover: `transition-colors` → `transition-[background-color,box-shadow] duration-150` so the inset accent bar animates in smoothly with the bg tint instead of snapping.
  3. (Audit-only, no change) Sticky header `sticky top-0 chrome z-10` is present per spec; the known CSS limitation where `overflow-x-auto` wrapper becomes the sticky containing block (preventing vertical stick to the outer 640px scroll container) is documented but left as-is — fixing it would require breaking column alignment or removing horizontal scroll.
- TradeDetailPage.tsx: 4 fixes (all layout-only):
  1. RR bar refactored from absolute-positioned bars (which left a visible gap during animation because the reward bar's left was pinned to the risk bar's final position) to a flex layout with `shrink-0` bars — bars are now always contiguous at every animation frame.
  2. Plan card: `flex flex-col` + RR bar wrapper `mt-6` → `mt-auto pt-6` — pushes the RR bar to the bottom of the card so the shorter Plan card (4 dl items + RR) balances the taller Execution card (9 dl items) under grid stretch.
  3. Review card: `flex flex-col` + save button `mt-5` → `mt-auto pt-5` — pushes the save button to the bottom so the shorter Review card balances the taller Context card (3 blockquotes + screenshots).
  4. Execution + Context cards: `flex flex-col` added for defensive consistency across all four cards in the two grids (no visual change; no bottom-pinned elements needed).
- Lint: clean (exit 0). Build: ✓ Compiled successfully in 9.1s, 7/7 static pages.
- Next actions: (a) The sticky-header-through-overflow-x-auto limitation is a known CSS pattern issue across the project's table components; if vertical sticky is required, consider restructuring tables to use a JS-based sticky header or a separate header table with shared colgroup widths. (b) The Execution card has 9 dl items (odd) leaving the last item alone in the left column of the 2-col grid — acceptable but could be balanced by reordering or adding a 10th metadata field if desired (out of scope, content change). (c) The RR bar's two motion.divs animate widths independently (risk at delay 0.7s, reward at delay 1.0s) — during the 0.3s overlap the risk bar is finishing while the reward bar is starting; with the new flex layout they stay contiguous throughout, but if a perfectly synchronized grow is desired, both bars could share the same delay (currently staggered for a sequential reveal effect — left as-is per original design intent).

Task ID: R3-a
Agent: motion-reveal
Task: Add scroll-triggered section reveal animations + page transition polish

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md, existing Reveal.tsx primitive, globals.css design tokens, page.tsx, Navbar (confirmed `h-16` so progress bar sits at `top-16`), and Bento/Pricing/FinalCTA marketing components for the exact `<h2>` heading lines to enhance.
- Created `src/components/tj/ScrollReveal.tsx` — `"use client"` flexible directional scroll-reveal wrapper. Supports `direction` ("up"|"down"|"left"|"right"|"scale"), `distance` (default 24), `delay`, `once`, `duration`, optional `as` polymorphic tag. Uses `whileInView` with `viewport={{ once, margin: "-80px" }}` and the same `[0.22, 1, 0.36, 1]` premium easing as the existing `Reveal` primitive so they feel like siblings. Kept `Reveal` untouched (back-compat).
- Created `src/components/tj/ReadingProgress.tsx` — `"use client"` thin accent reading-progress bar. Uses `useScroll()` (document scroll) → `useSpring` (stiffness 120, damping 30) → `motion.div` with `scaleX` and `transformOrigin: left`. Positioned `fixed top-16 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 z-40 bg-tj-accent pointer-events-none hidden md:block` (hidden on mobile, sits just under the navbar).
- Edited `src/app/globals.css` — added three utilities inside the existing `@layer utilities` block:
  - `.snap-container { scroll-snap-type: y proximity; }`
  - `.snap-section { scroll-snap-align: start; scroll-snap-stop: normal; }`
  - `.text-balance { text-wrap: balance; }`
  None are applied globally — they are opt-in classes.
- Edited `src/app/page.tsx` — imported `ReadingProgress` and rendered it right after `<Navbar />` so the bar sits at the top of the viewport below the navbar.
- Edited `src/components/marketing/Bento.tsx` — added `text-balance` to the features `<h2>` (the `t("featuresTitle")` heading).
- Edited `src/components/marketing/Pricing.tsx` — added `text-balance` to the pricing `<h2>` (the `t("pricingTitle")` heading).
- Edited `src/components/marketing/FinalCTA.tsx` — added `text-balance` to the final CTA `<h2>` headline.
- Verified: `bun run lint` clean (no warnings/errors). `bun run build` compiles successfully in 10s and generates all 7 static pages.
- No indigo/blue introduced — all animations and the progress bar use the existing `bg-tj-accent` token (graphite-blue accent palette, not Tailwind's indigo/blue).

Stage Summary:
- Two new motion primitives (`ScrollReveal`, `ReadingProgress`) added under `src/components/tj/`.
- Page-level scroll experience enhanced: directional reveals now available, a spring-smoothed accent progress bar tracks reading depth (desktop only), and three key marketing headings now use `text-balance` for more even line breaks.
- Three opt-in CSS utilities (`.snap-container`, `.snap-section`, `.text-balance`) added without global side effects.
- Lint + production build pass clean. Ready for the next round of motion polish (e.g. wiring `ScrollReveal` into specific marketing sections if desired).

  - `"use client"`, `useLang()` for ES/EN, eyebrow "Integraciones"/"Integrations", title "Importa de cualquier broker."/"Import from any broker." with `text-gradient` span on the emphasised fragment, lead text "CSV universal. Mapea columnas una sola vez y olídate."/"Universal CSV. Map columns once and forget."
  - Background: `SlowMoChart` at `opacity={0.04}` (spec-exact) inside `absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none` wrapper, `cycle={22} points={110}` for a slow ambient curve.

  - Each pill: `group relative glass rounded-card p-4 flex flex-col gap-3` (spec-exact classes), broker name in `text-secondary font-semibold text-sm`, a small `CSV` chip (`pill bg-white/5 text-tertiary border border-white/8 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.14em]`) top-right and a monospaced 2-letter monogram mark top-left (`w-9 h-9 rounded-md bg-white/5 border border-white/8` with inline `fontFamily` ui-monospace stack to render the monogram in a distinct typeface without importing a new font).
  - Hover: `whileHover={{ y: -4 }}` lift + an accent border-glow div (`boxShadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgb(var(--accent-base) / 0.45), 0 0 20px rgb(var(--accent-base) / 0.18)`) that fades in via `group-hover:opacity-100`; also added `hover:border-tj-accent/60` to the card itself for the border tint.
  - Entrance: per-card staggered `Reveal`-style motion (initial opacity/y → whileInView) with `delay={(i % 5) * 0.08}` so each row staggers independently.
  - Footer line: a `Reveal`-wrapped `<p>` reminder ("¿Tu broker no está en la lista? Si exporta a CSV, este diario lo importa." / "Your broker not on the list? If it exports to CSV, this journal imports it.").

  - `"use client"`, `useLang()` for ES/EN, eyebrow "Lo que dicen"/"What they say", title "Traders que ya operan con disciplina."/"Traders already operating with discipline." with `text-gradient` span on the emphasised fragment, plus a 1-sentence lead.
  - Background: `ParticleField` at `opacity={0.15}` (spec-exact) inside `absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none` wrapper, `count={42} linkDistance={140}` for a richer constellation than SocialProof's 36.
  - Masonry: `columns-1 md:columns-2 lg:columns-3 gap-4` (spec-exact) with `break-inside-avoid mb-4` on every card.

  - Each card: `group relative glass rounded-card p-5 mb-4 break-inside-avoid` (spec-exact), 5-star rating row in accent (13×13 SVGs filled `rgb(var(--accent-base))`), verified chip with a small green check SVG (`rgb(var(--pnl-pos))`) + "Verificado"/"Verified" label, quote text with accent-tinted curly quotes `“…”`, author block with SVG-initials avatar (`w-9 h-9 rounded-full` filled with the testimonial's hue token) + name + role, separated by a `border-t hairline border-solid`.
  - Hover: same accent border-glow div pattern as SocialProof for visual consistency.
  - Entrance: per-card staggered motion with `delay={(i % 3) * 0.12}` (column-wise stagger so the first card of each column enters together, the rest follow).
- Wired both into `src/app/page.tsx`:
  - Added `import { Integrations } from "@/components/marketing/Integrations";` and `import { TestimonialsWall } from "@/components/marketing/TestimonialsWall";` in alphabetical position.

Stage Summary:
- Two new marketing sections shipped: `Integrations.tsx` (10-broker CSV logo wall with monogram + chip + accent glow hover, SlowMoChart background at opacity 0.04) and `TestimonialsWall.tsx` (6-voice masonry wall with CSS multicol `columns-1 md:columns-2 lg:columns-3 gap-4` + `break-inside-avoid`, ParticleField background at opacity 0.15, 5-star ratings + verified chips + SVG-initials avatars).

Task ID: R3-d
Agent: chart-tooltips
Task: Add advanced chart tooltips + enhanced hover states to charts

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md for project context (premium trading journal, Next.js 16 + Tailwind v4 + Framer Motion, ES/EN bilingual, .glass/.tnum/accent-based color system, no indigo/blue) and reviewed the four target files plus their callers (DashboardPage renders EquityCurve + MiniCalendar inside glass cards; AnalyticsPage renders 3 Histograms + Heatmap inside SectionCard `glass rounded-card p-4 md:p-5` — none of the parents clip with `overflow: hidden`, so absolutely-positioned tooltips can extend slightly outside the chart container into the card padding).
- Reviewed `lib/trading/format.ts` (fmtMoney with sign/decimals), `lib/trading/data.ts` (Metrics.equityCurve = `{date, balance, perf: bal-INITIAL_BALANCE}[]`, Metrics.drawdownCeiling = running peak per index, `heatmap()` returns 5×6 P&L grid Mon–Fri × 4h buckets), and `lib/i18n.tsx` (`useLang()` → `{ lang, t }`, Lang = "es"|"en").
- Enhanced `src/components/charts/EquityCurve.tsx`:
  - Added `useLang` import; replaced `hoverIdx: number | null` with `hover: { idx; mx; width } | null` so the tooltip can follow the mouse X (px, relative to the SVG element) rather than the data-point X — the data-point X is still used for the crosshair + pulsing marker.
  - Added a horizontal crosshair line at the hover point's Y (dashed `rgb(var(--accent-base) / 0.28)`) alongside the existing vertical crosshair.
  - Replaced the static hover dot with: (1) an inner solid `<circle r=4>` (unchanged visual) + (2) an outer `<motion.circle>` ping ring that animates `r: [4, 12]` + `opacity: [0.6, 0]` over 1.4s `repeat: Infinity easeOut` — a subtle expanding halo (the snap-back happens at opacity 0, so it reads as a continuous pulse).
  - Rewrote the tooltip content: date (locale-aware `es-ES`/`en-US`, 2-digit day + short month + year), balance (large `text-[13px] font-semibold tnum text-primary`), "Desde inicio"/"Since start" → perf with `+`/`−` sign colored pos/neg, "Desde pico"/"From peak" → drawdown (`ceiling - balance`) in red when > 0, `$0` in tertiary when at a new high. All numeric values use `tnum`.
  - Tooltip X is clamped with `Math.max(TOOLTIP_HALF, Math.min(w - TOOLTIP_HALF, mx))` (TOOLTIP_HALF=92px ≈ half of the ~180px tooltip) so it never overflows left/right edges. Tooltip Y now follows the marker (`markerY - 10` with `translate(-50%, -100%)`) and flips below the marker (`markerY + 14` with `translateX(-50%)`) when `markerY < 92` to avoid overflowing the top of the chart.
  - Removed the unused `minDate`/`maxDate` from the `useMemo` return (they were destructured but never referenced); kept `minBal`/`maxBal` because the grid axis still uses them.
- Enhanced `src/components/charts/Heatmap.tsx`:
  - Added `useRef`/`useState` imports and a `containerRef` + `hovered: { r; c; x; y } | null` state.
  - Added a `countGrid` useMemo that mirrors the `heatmap()` bucketing (Mon–Fri rows, 4-hour columns) but counts trades instead of summing P&L — needed for the "trade count if > 0" tooltip line.
  - Removed the `title` attribute from each cell; added `onMouseEnter` (computes cell-center X and cell-top Y relative to `containerRef`) and `onMouseLeave` handlers. Kept the existing `whileHover={{ scale: 1.08 }}` and the in-cell magnitude label.
  - Wrapped the outer `<div>` with `relative` + `ref={containerRef}` and rendered a floating `glass rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-xs whitespace-nowrap z-10 pointer-events-none absolute` tooltip when `hovered` is set, showing `{WEEKDAYS_SHORT[r]} · {HOUR_LABELS[c]}` (tertiary caption), `fmtMoney(grid[r][c], lang, { sign: true, decimals: 0 })` (pos/neg colored), and `{count} ops`/`{count} trades` (tertiary, only when count > 0). Positioned with `left: clamp(92px, ${x}px, calc(100% - 92px))` + `top: ${y - 6}px` + `transform: translate(-50%, -100%)` so the tooltip sits above the cell and stays within the chart bounds.
- Enhanced `src/components/charts/MiniCalendar.tsx`:
  - Added `useRef`/`useState` imports and a `containerRef` + `hovered: { day; x; y } | null` state.
  - Removed the `title` attribute from each day cell; added `onMouseEnter` (computes cell-center X and cell-top Y relative to `containerRef`) and `onMouseLeave` handlers. Kept the existing `whileHover={{ scale: 1.06 }}` and the in-cell day/P&L labels.
  - Wrapped the outer `<div>` with `relative` + `ref={containerRef}` and rendered a floating glass tooltip when `hovered` is set, showing `{day} {monthName} {year}` (tertiary caption) and either `fmtMoney(pnl, lang, { sign: true })` (pos/neg colored) when the day has trades or "Sin operaciones"/"No trades" (tertiary) when empty. Positioned with `left: clamp(80px, ${x}px, calc(100% - 80px))` + `top: ${y - 6}px` + `transform: translate(-50%, -100%)` — sits above the cell, clamped to the calendar width.
- Enhanced `src/components/charts/Histogram.tsx`:
  - Added `useRef`/`useState` + `useLang` imports and a `containerRef` + `hovered: { i; x; y } | null` state.
  - Removed the inline count `<span>` that floated above each bar (`absolute -top-5 ... opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100`) and replaced it with a container-level floating glass tooltip — same `glass rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-xs whitespace-nowrap z-10 pointer-events-none absolute` styling as the other three charts.
  - Moved `onMouseEnter`/`onMouseLeave` to the bar column wrapper (`flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-end h-full group relative`) so the tooltip anchors to the bar's center X and top Y. Added a subtle opacity lift on the active bar (`opacity: hovered?.i === i ? 1 : 0.85`) to make the hover state more legible.
  - Tooltip shows `formatX(data[i].x)` (the bucket label, tertiary caption) + `{count} ops`/`{count} trades` (primary, `tnum`). Positioned with `left: clamp(72px, ${x}px, calc(100% - 72px))` + `top: ${y - 6}px` + `transform: translate(-50%, -100%)`.
- Verified rules: all four files keep `"use client"` ✓; NO indigo/blue introduced (only `--accent-base`, `--accent-hover`, `--pnl-pos`, `--pnl-neg`, `--txt-primary/secondary/tertiary`, `--divider`) ✓; every numeric value in the tooltips carries `tnum` (balances, P&L, drawdown, counts) ✓; no existing features removed — the crosshair, drawdown shading, animated draw-in, weekday/monthly headers, bar animations, etc. are all preserved ✓; ES/EN labels added for the new tooltip copy ("Desde inicio"/"Since start", "Desde pico"/"From peak", "Sin operaciones"/"No trades", "ops"/"trades") ✓.
- Verified: `bun run lint 2>&1 | tail -15` → exit 0, no errors, no warnings (eslint . ran clean). `bun run build 2>&1 | tail -10` → ✓ Compiled successfully in 9.4s, all 7 routes prerendered as static content.

Stage Summary:
- All four chart components now share a consistent premium tooltip language: floating `glass rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-xs` panels with an accent border (from `.glass`), `pointer-events-none absolute z-10`, anchored above the hovered element and clamped with `clamp(minPx, ${anchorX}px, calc(100% - minPx))` so they never overflow the chart's left/right edges.
- EquityCurve: vertical + horizontal dashed crosshairs, pulsing ping ring around the hover dot (framer-motion `r:[4,12] opacity:[0.6,0]`), and a richer tooltip (date + balance + P&L since start + drawdown from peak, ES/EN labels, all `tnum`). Tooltip X follows the mouse and is clamped to the chart width; tooltip Y flips above/below the marker to avoid top-edge overflow.
- Heatmap: native `title` attribute replaced with a custom floating tooltip showing day · hour-range, signed P&L (`fmtMoney`), and trade count when > 0. Added a `countGrid` useMemo to back the count line.
- MiniCalendar: native `title` attribute replaced with a custom floating tooltip showing the date, signed P&L (`fmtMoney`), or "Sin operaciones"/"No trades" for empty days.
- Histogram: inline count-above-bar span replaced with the same glass tooltip pattern, showing the bucket range (via `formatX`) + count, plus a subtle opacity lift on the active bar.
- Lint: clean (exit 0). Build: ✓ Compiled successfully, 7/7 static routes.
- Next actions: (a) If the Heatmap/MiniCalendar tooltips ever visually clip inside a future `overflow: hidden` parent, the `clamp()` X-clamp already prevents horizontal overflow; vertical overflow above row 0 lands inside the SectionCard's `p-4 md:p-5` padding, which is the intended behavior. (b) The `EquityCurve` tooltip's `TOOLTIP_HALF = 92` and the heatmap/calendar/histogram clamp widths (92/80/72) are tuned to current content; if tooltip copy grows significantly they should be re-measured. (c) The pulsing ping ring uses `repeat: Infinity` only while `hoverPoint` is set (it unmounts on `mouseLeave`), so there's no idle CPU cost when the chart isn't hovered.

Task ID: R3-e
Agent: animated-numbers
Task: Add animated number counters + live price ticker enhancement

Work Log:
- Read worklog.md, useInView.ts, format.ts, existing Ticker.tsx, ProofBar.tsx, CountUp.tsx, SlowMoChart.tsx, Money.tsx, KpiStrip.tsx and i18n.tsx for context (design tokens, tone conventions, locale-aware formatting, deterministic-render rules).
- Created `src/components/tj/AnimatedNumber.tsx`:
  - `"use client"` component animating 0 → `value` with `easeOutExpo` via `requestAnimationFrame`, triggered once when scrolled into view via `@/components/tj/useInView` (`{ once: true, rootMargin: "60px" }`).
  - Props: `value`, `format?: "money" | "percent" | "int" | "decimal"`, `decimals?`, `prefix?`, `suffix?`, `duration?` (default 1.6s), `className?`, `tone?: "pos"|"neg"|"neutral"`.
  - Formatting delegated to `fmtMoney` / `fmtPct` / `fmtInt` / `fmtNum` from `@/lib/trading/format` with the active `useLang()` locale — so ES uses `es-ES` (`.`, `,`) and EN uses `en-US` (`,`, `.`) automatically.
  - `tnum` always applied; tone adds `text-pnl-pos` / `text-pnl-neg`. SSR-safe: initial render shows the formatted 0 (same on server + client), animation only starts after IntersectionObserver fires on the client — no hydration mismatch.
  - `startedRef` guards the rAF loop so it only kicks off once even if `inView` flickers.
- Enhanced `src/components/marketing/Ticker.tsx`:
  - Added `hashStr` (FNV-1a) → deterministic 32-bit seed from the symbol string. Added `buildSparklinePath(sym, chg)`: a biased random walk driven by an LCG (state = state·1664525 + 1013904223 mod 2³²) seeded from the hash; the per-step drift is `sign(chg) · min(0.35, |chg|/12)` so the sparkline's visual trend matches the displayed % change. Pure function — safe to call in render, no `Math.random` → no hydration mismatch.
  - Pre-computed `SPARKLINE_PATHS: string[]` once at module load from `TICKER_ITEMS` so the paths are not recomputed on each `Row` re-render (the row re-renders every 3s on `flashIndex` change).
  - New `Sparkline` component: `<svg viewBox="0 0 80 20" preserveAspectRatio="none" className="inline-block w-12 h-3 align-middle">` with a single `<path>` (strokeWidth 1.6, `vectorEffect="non-scaling-stroke"` so the stroke stays crisp at the 48×12 display size). Stroke color is `rgb(var(--pnl-pos))` for `chg ≥ 0` and `rgb(var(--pnl-neg))` otherwise. `aria-hidden="true"`.
  - Inserted `<Sparkline>` between the symbol name and the % change inside each ticker item; changed the item wrapper from `items-baseline` to `items-center` so the 12px SVG aligns cleanly with the `text-xs` symbol/price.
- Enhanced `src/components/marketing/ProofBar.tsx`:
  - Replaced all four `CountUp` usages with `AnimatedNumber` (same target values / decimals / prefix / suffix), mapping each stat to its `format`: 312 → `int`, 48 (+ locale suffix) → `int`, $2.4M → `decimal`/`decimals=1`/`prefix="$"`/`suffix="M"`, 4.9/5 → `decimal`/`decimals=1`/`suffix="/5"`.
  - Added a `LivePulse` component (top-right corner of each tile, `absolute top-3 right-3`): a solid `bg-tj-accent/80` 6px dot with a `motion.span` ping ring that animates `opacity: [0, 0.75, 0]` + `scale: [0.6, 2.4, 2.6]` over 1.2s with `repeat: Infinity, repeatDelay: 3.8` → a 5s cycle (1.2s pulse + 3.8s rest) simulating live data updates. `aria-hidden="true"`.
  - Wired `useReducedMotion()` from framer-motion: when reduced motion is preferred, the ping ring is not rendered (the solid dot stays) so there's no motion penalty.
  - Made the tile wrapper `relative` so the absolute-positioned pulse dot anchors correctly.
- Verified rules: `"use client"` on all three files ✓; NO indigo/blue introduced (only `--accent-base`, `--pnl-pos`, `--pnl-neg`) ✓; `tnum` on every numeric span ✓; deterministic data only — sparkline paths come from a hash-seeded LCG, no `Math.random` in render ✓; ES/EN locale-aware formatting via `useLang` ✓; reduced-motion honored in both the ticker (existing) and the new ProofBar pulse ✓.
- Verified: `cd /home/z/my-project && bun run lint 2>&1 | tail -15` → exit 0, `eslint .` ran clean, no errors, no warnings. `bun run build 2>&1 | tail -10` → ✓ Compiled successfully in 9.8s, all 7 routes prerendered as static content.

Stage Summary:
- New reusable `AnimatedNumber` component (rAF + easeOutExpo + useInView + locale-aware TJ formatting) available at `@/components/tj/AnimatedNumber` for any future count-up need across the site.
- Ticker now shows a per-symbol deterministic sparkline (48×12 SVG, pos/neg colored) between the symbol name and the % change — same data on server and client (no hydration mismatch), and the path is computed once at module load so the 3s flash re-renders stay cheap.
- ProofBar stats now animate via `AnimatedNumber` (smoother easeOutExpo curve, locale-aware separators) and each tile carries a subtle "live data" pulse dot in the top-right corner that fires a ping ring every 5s (reduced-motion-aware).
- Lint: clean (exit 0). Build: ✓ Compiled successfully, 7/7 static routes.
- Next actions: (a) The sparkline's `trend = sign(chg) · min(0.35, |chg|/12)` bias is tuned for the current 14 ticker items (|chg| ranges 0.05–3.2); if much larger magnitudes are added, the cap keeps the walk inside [0.12, 0.88] so it won't clip. (b) The `LivePulse` cycle (1.2s pulse + 3.8s rest = 5s) is the only motion added to ProofBar; if a future design wants the dot itself to flash brighter (not just the ring), add a parallel `motion.span` on the solid dot animating `opacity: [0.8, 1, 0.8]` with the same timing. (c) `AnimatedNumber` could later gain a `from?: number` prop (currently always 0) if a delta-style animation is needed; the existing `CountUp` is kept for backward compat with the 12 other call sites.
